                console.print("[bold cyan]вң” лЎңм»¬-мң„нӮӨ м—°лҸҷмқҙ м„ұкіөм ҒмңјлЎң мҷ„лЈҢлҗҳм—ҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ![/bold cyan]")
                continue
                
            # Local Asset List мЎ°нҡҢ
            if user_input.lower() in ['l', 'list']:
                base_dir = os.path.join(os.getcwd(), ".agents")
                if not os.path.exists(base_dir):
                    console.print("\n[yellow]в–ј нҳ„мһ¬ лЎңм»¬м—җ мҲҳм§‘/л°°нҸ¬лҗң лЈ°мқҙлӮҳ мҠӨнӮ¬мқҙ м—ҶмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. (.agents нҸҙлҚ” м—ҶмқҢ)[/yellow]")
                    continue
                
                bookstack = BookStackToolset()
                with console.status("[cyan]BookStack мң„нӮӨмҷҖ лЎңм»¬ нҳ„нҷ©мқ„ л№„көҗ л¶„м„қ мӨ‘мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ...[/cyan]", spinner="dots"):
                    try:
                        plan = await bookstack.get_upsert_plan(workspace)
                    except ValueError as e:
                        console.print(f"\n[bold yellow]вҡ  {e}[/bold yellow]")
                        continue
                
                # лЈ©м—… л”•м…”л„ҲлҰ¬ мғқм„ұ (rel_path: action)
                plan_lookup = {item["rel_path"]: item["action"] for item in plan}
                
                # лҢҖнҷ”нҳ• List Viewer мӢӨн–ү (full_planВ·bookstackВ·pt_style м „лӢ¬лЎң u кё°лҠҘ нҶөн•©)
                await run_list_viewer(
                    plan_lookup, base_dir,
                    full_plan=plan,
                    bookstack=bookstack,
                    upsert_style=pt_style,
                    project_id=workspace
                )
                
                console.print("\n[bold cyan]вң” лЎңм»¬ нҳ„нҷ© мЎ°нҡҢлҘј мҷ„лЈҢн–ҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.[/bold cyan]")
                continue
                
            if not user_input:
                continue

            # мқјл°ҳ мұ— мҝјлҰ¬мқём§Җ нҢҢмқҙн”„лқјмқё мӢңмһ‘(s)мқём§Җ л¶„кё°
            if not (user_input.lower().startswith("s ") or user_input.lower() == "s" or user_input.lower().startswith("start ") or user_input.lower() == "start"):
                await handle_chat_query(user_input, workspace, console)
                continue
                
            user_prompt = user_input[2:].strip() if user_input.lower().startswith("s ") else user_input[6:].strip()
            if user_input.lower() in ["s", "start"]:
                console.print(
                    "\n[dim]вҳ… мһ‘м„ұ мҳҲмӢң:[/dim]\n"
                    "[dim]  1) мӢңмһ‘[/dim]\n"
                    "[dim]  2) м—җмқҙм „нҠёк°Җ PR лҰ¬л·°лҘј мҲҳн–үн•  мҲҳ мһҲлҸ„лЎқ лҸ•лҠ” мҪ”л“ң л¶„м„қ мҠӨнӮ¬(skill) мҠӨнҒ¬лҰҪнҠёлҘј л§Ңл“Өм–ҙмӨҳ.[/dim]"
                )
                with patch_stdout():
                    user_prompt = await session.prompt_async("в–  мҲҳн–үн•  AI нҢҢмқҙн”„лқјмқё мһ‘м—…мқ„ кө¬мІҙм ҒмңјлЎң мһ…л Ҙн•ҳм„ёмҡ” вқҜ ")
                    user_prompt = user_prompt.strip()
                    
                if user_prompt.lower() in ['q', 'quit']:
                    console.print("\n[bold red]в–  н”„лЎңк·ёлһЁмқ„ мҰүмӢң мў…лЈҢн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.[/bold red]")
                    sys.exit(0)
                        
                if not user_prompt:
                    continue
                    
                if user_prompt.lower() in ['l', 'list', 'u', 'upsert', 'r', 'reset']:
                    console.print(f"\n[yellow]вҡ  '{user_prompt}' м»Өл§Ёл“ңлҠ” л©”мқё н”„лЎ¬н”„нҠём—җм„ң лӢЁлҸ…мңјлЎң мһ…л Ҙн•ҙмЈјм„ёмҡ”. нҢҢмқҙн”„лқјмқё м§ҖмӢңмӮ¬н•ӯмңјлЎңлҠ” л¶Җм Ғм Ҳн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.[/yellow]")
                    continue

            if user_prompt in ['1', 'мӢңмһ‘']:
                user_prompt = "нҳ„мһ¬ лЎңм»¬ н”„лЎңм қнҠёмқҳ кө¬мЎ°мҷҖ мқҙлҜё м •мқҳлҗң мң„нӮӨ м •мұ…л“Өмқ„ м „л°ҳм ҒмңјлЎң л¶„м„қн•ҳмӢӯмӢңмҳӨ. л§Ңм•Ҫ мң„нӮӨм—җ мЎҙмһ¬н•ҳлҠ” н•өмӢ¬/лІ”мҡ© к·ңм •мқҙ мһҲм§Җл§Ң мқҙ мӣҢнҒ¬мҠӨнҺҳмқҙмҠӨ лЎңм»¬(`.agents`)м—җ м•„м§Ғ л°ҳмҳҒлҗҳм§Җ м•Ҡм•ҳлӢӨл©ҙ, нҳ„мһ¬ н”„лЎңм қнҠёмқҳ м„ұкІ©кіј нҷҳкІҪм—җ л§һкІҢ лӮҙмҡ©мқ„ ліҖнҳ•В·лі‘н•©н•ҳм—¬ мөңм Ғнҷ”лҗң лЎңм»¬ лЈ°(Rule)мқҙлӮҳ лІ”мҡ© мҠӨнӮ¬(Skill)лЎң мһ‘м„ұн•ҙмӨҳ."

            console.print(f"\n[cyan]в–¶ нҢҢмқҙн”„лқјмқё мҲҳн–ү м§ҖмӢң:[/cyan] {user_prompt}\n")
            
            command_prompt = (
                f"мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗ м§ҖмӢң: \"{user_prompt}\"\n\n"
                f"Target Workspace: `{workspace}`\n"
                f"нғҖкІҹ м—җмқҙм „нҠё: `{target_agent}`\n"
                f"мң„ м§ҖмӢңлҘј л°”нғ•мңјлЎң лЎңм»¬ нҳ„нҷ©кіј BookStack м •мұ…мқ„ мңөн•©н•ҳм—¬ мғҲлЎңмҡҙ лЈ°/мҠӨнӮ¬мқ„ мғқм„ұн•ҳм„ёмҡ”."
            )

            # 3. лқјмқҙлёҢ мғҒнғң нҠёлҰ¬ мӨҖл№„
            main_tree = Tree(f"в—Һ нҢҢмқҙн”„лқјмқё м§„н–ү мғҒнғң")
            nodes = {}
            agents_info = [
                ("context_profiler", "Context Profiler"), 
                ("skill_architect", "Skill Architect"), 
                ("critical_verifier", "Critical Verifier"), 
                ("deployment_executor", "Deployment Executor")
            ]
            
            active_subnodes = {} # agent_id: set of (node_obj, original_text, color)
            for key, name in agents_info:
                nodes[key] = main_tree.add(f"[{'dim' if key != 'context_profiler' else 'bold'}]{name}[/]")
                # мҙҲкё° мғҒнғңлҠ” л¬ҙмЎ°кұҙ н•ҳмң„ л…ёл“ңлЎң лҢҖкё°мӨ‘ н•ң мӨ„л§Ң н‘ңмӢң
                wait_node = nodes[key].add("[dim]лҢҖкё°мӨ‘[/dim]")
                active_subnodes[key] = {(wait_node, "лҢҖкё°мӨ‘", "dim")}

            active_agents = set()
            SPINNER_FRAMES = ["в Ӣ", "в ҷ", "в №", "в ё", "в ј", "в ҙ", "в Ұ", "в §", "в Ү", "в Ҹ"]

            def add_subnode(agent_id, text, color):
                if agent_id not in active_subnodes:
                    active_subnodes[agent_id] = set()
                new_node = nodes[agent_id].add(f"[{color}]{text}[/{color}]")
                active_subnodes[agent_id].add((new_node, text, color))

            def finish_subnode(agent_id, target_text, success=True):
                if agent_id in active_subnodes:
                    for obj in list(active_subnodes[agent_id]):
                        node, text, color = obj
                        if text == target_text:
                            active_subnodes[agent_id].remove(obj)
                            if success:
                                node.label = f"[dim {color}]{text}[/dim {color}]"
                            else:
                                node.label = f"[bold red]{text} (мӢӨнҢЁ)[/bold red]"
                            break

            async def tree_animator():
                frame_idx = 0
                try:
                    while True:
                        for agent_id, sub_set in list(active_subnodes.items()):
                            for (node, text, color) in sub_set:
                                if text != "лҢҖкё°мӨ‘":
                                    node.label = f"[{color}]{SPINNER_FRAMES[frame_idx]} {text}[/{color}]"
                        frame_idx = (frame_idx + 1) % len(SPINNER_FRAMES)
                        await asyncio.sleep(0.1)
                except asyncio.CancelledError:
                    pass

            # 4. нҢҢмқҙн”„лқјмқё мӢӨн–ү
            with Live(main_tree, refresh_per_second=10, console=console) as live:
                animator_task = asyncio.create_task(tree_animator())
                try:
                    async for event in pipeline.run(command_prompt=command_prompt, session_id=session_id):
                        
                        if isinstance(event, dict):
                            e_type = event.get("type")
                            status = event.get("status")
                            agent_id = event.get("agent")
                            
                            if e_type == "phase_start" and agent_id in nodes:
                                # н•ҙлӢ№ м—җмқҙм „нҠё мӢңмһ‘ мӢң н•ҳмң„ л…ёл“ңлҘј мӢ№ л№„мҡ°кі  нҷңм„ұнҷ”
                                nodes[agent_id].children.clear()
                                active_subnodes[agent_id] = set()
                                
                                active_agents.add(agent_id)
                                idx = [k for k, _ in agents_info].index(agent_id)
                                nodes[agent_id].label = f"[bold cyan]{agents_info[idx][1]}[/bold cyan]"
                                
                                if "message" in event:
                                    add_subnode(agent_id, event['message'], "cyan")
                                else:
                                    add_subnode(agent_id, "м§„н–үмӨ‘...", "cyan")
                                    
                            elif e_type == "tool_call" and agent_id in nodes:
                                tool_name = event.get('tool_name')
                                add_subnode(agent_id, f"лҸ„кө¬ мӢӨн–ү: {tool_name}", "yellow")
                                
                            elif e_type == "subnode_add" and agent_id in nodes:
                                msg = event.get('message')
                                color = event.get('color', 'cyan')
                                add_subnode(agent_id, msg, color)
                                
                            elif e_type == "phase_end" and agent_id in nodes:
                                # нҳ„мһ¬ лҸҢкі мһҲлҠ” лӘЁл“  м„ңлёҢл…ёл“ң мҷ„лЈҢ мІҳлҰ¬
                                if agent_id in active_subnodes:
                                    for obj in list(active_subnodes[agent_id]):
                                        node, text, color = obj
                                        finish_subnode(agent_id, text, success=(event.get("status") == "success"))
                                
                                if agent_id in active_agents:
                                    active_agents.remove(agent_id)
                                    
                                idx = [k for k, _ in agents_info].index(agent_id)
                                color = "green" if event.get("status") == "success" else "red"
                                state_str = "(мҷ„лЈҢ)" if event.get("status") == "success" else "(мӢӨнҢЁ)"
                                nodes[agent_id].label = f"[bold {color}]{agents_info[idx][1]}[/bold {color}]"
                                nodes[agent_id].add(f"[bold {color}]{state_str}[/bold {color}]")

                            # 5. мӮ¬м „ кІҖнҶ  ліҙкі м„ң м¶ңл Ҙ л°Ҹ нҢҗлӢЁ лЈЁн”„ (HITL)
                            elif status == "pending_final_approval":
                                live.stop() # нҷ”л©ҙ к№Ём§җ л°©м§ҖлҘј мң„н•ҙ нҠёлҰ¬ л ҢлҚ”л§Ғ мқјмӢң мӨ‘м§Җ
                                
                                console.print("\n")
                                console.print(Panel(Markdown(event.get("report", "лӮҙмҡ© м—ҶмқҢ")), title="вүЎ [мөңмў… л°ҳмҳҒ кІҖнҶ  ліҙкі м„ң]", border_style="yellow"))
                                console.print("[bold yellow]вқ– мң„ мӮ°м¶ңл¬јмқ„ нҷ•мқён•ҳкі  мҠ№мқё(Y) н•ҳкұ°лӮҳ мҲҳм • м§ҖмӢңлҘј мһ…л Ҙн•ҳм„ёмҡ”.[/bold yellow]")
                                
                                cancel_pipeline = False
                                while True:
                                    session.is_hitl = True
                                    with patch_stdout():
                                        sub_input = await session.prompt_async("в–  мҠ№мқё(Y) / л°ҳл Ө(N) / м·ЁмҶҢ(C) / мҲҳм • мҡ”мІӯ вқҜ ")
                                    session.is_hitl = False
                                    sub_input = sub_input.strip()
                                    
                                    if sub_input.lower() in ['q', 'quit']:
                                        animator_task.cancel()
                                        console.print("\n[bold red]в–  н”„лЎңк·ёлһЁмқ„ мҰүмӢң мў…лЈҢн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.[/bold red]")
                                        sys.exit(0)
                                    elif sub_input.lower() in ['y', 'yes', 'мҠ№мқё', 'г…Үг…Ү', '']:
                                        console.print("\n[bold green]вң” мҠ№мқё мҷ„лЈҢ. лЎңм»¬ л°°нҸ¬ л°Ҹ GWS мҡ”м•Ҫ м „мҶЎмқ„ мӢңмһ‘н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.[/bold green]")
                                        await pipeline.resume(session_id, {"approved": True})
                                        break
                                    elif sub_input.lower() in ['n', 'no', 'л°ҳл Ө', 'кұ°м Ҳ']:
                                        console.print("\n[bold red]X мҠ№мқё кұ°м Ҳ. мҡ”кө¬мӮ¬н•ӯмқ„ л°ҳмҳҒн•ҳм—¬ мһ¬кё°нҡҚн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.[/bold red]")
                                        await pipeline.resume(session_id, {"approved": False, "feedback": "мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗк°Җ л°ҳл Өн–ҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ."})
                                        break
                                    elif sub_input.lower() in ['c', 'м·ЁмҶҢ', 'cancel']:
                                        console.print("\n[bold yellow]в–  нҢҢмқҙн”„лқјмқё мҲҳн–үмқ„ м·ЁмҶҢн•ҳкі  мҙҲкё° н”„лЎ¬н”„нҠёлЎң лҸҢм•„к°‘лӢҲлӢӨ.[/bold yellow]")
                                        cancel_pipeline = True
                                        # pipeline generator cleanup will be triggered when breaking out of async for
                                        break
                                    else:
                                        console.print(f"\n[bold magenta]в–¶ н”јл“ңл°ұ м „лӢ¬ мҷ„лЈҢ. мҡ”кө¬мӮ¬н•ӯмқ„ л°ҳмҳҒн•ҳм—¬ мһ¬кё°нҡҚн•©лӢҲлӢӨ...[/bold magenta]")
                                        # нҠёлҰ¬ мғҒнғң мҙҲкё°нҷ” нӣ„ мһ¬к°ҖлҸҷ
                                        for key, name in agents_info:
                                            nodes[key].label = f"[dim]{name}[/dim]"
                                            nodes[key].children.clear()
                                            wait_node = nodes[key].add("[dim]лҢҖкё°мӨ‘[/dim]")
                                            active_subnodes[key] = {(wait_node, "лҢҖкё°мӨ‘", "dim")}
                                        await pipeline.resume(session_id, {"approved": False, "feedback": sub_input})
                                        break
                                
                                live.start() # нҠёлҰ¬ л ҢлҚ”л§Ғ мһ¬к°ң
                                if cancel_pipeline:
                                    break
                finally:
                    animator_task.cancel()

            console.print("\n[bold green]вҳ… мҡ”мІӯн•ҳмӢ  нҢҢмқҙн”„лқјмқё мһ‘м—…мқҙ мҷ„лЈҢлҗҳм—ҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. м¶”к°Җ м§ҖмӢңлҘј мһ…л Ҙн•ҳм„ёмҡ”.[/bold green]")

        except KeyboardInterrupt:
            console.print("\n[bold red]рҹ‘Ӣ мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗм—җ мқҳн•ҙ к°•м ң мў…лЈҢлҗҳм—ҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ (Ctrl+C).[/bold red]")
            sys.exit(0)
        except EOFError:
            sys.exit(0)
        except Exception as e:
            console.print_exception(show_locals=False)
            console.print(f"\n[bold red]вң– м—җлҹ¬ л°ңмғқ: {e}[/bold red]")


@app.command
def setup():
    """
    arti-ops лҘј м „м—ӯм ҒмңјлЎң мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳкё° мң„н•ң кёҖлЎңлІҢ мқёмҰқ м •ліҙлҘј м„Өм •н•ҳкұ°лӮҳ мһ¬м„Өм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
    """
    console.print(Panel("[bold cyan]arti-ops кёҖлЎңлІҢ мқёмҰқ м„Өм •[/bold cyan]"))
    
    home_dir = Path.home() / ".arti-ops"
    home_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    
    cred_file = home_dir / "credentials"
    if cred_file.exists():
        console.print("в”Ј [yellow]кё°мЎҙ мқёмҰқ м •ліҙк°Җ мЎҙмһ¬н•©лӢҲлӢӨ. мғҲлЎң мһ…л Ҙн•ҳм—¬ лҚ®м–ҙм”ҒлӢҲлӢӨ.[/yellow]")
        
    try:
        from prompt_toolkit import prompt
        gemini_key = prompt("в”ғ вқҜ Gemini API KeY: ", is_password=True).strip()
        bs_url = prompt("в”ғ вқҜ BookStack API URL (ex: https://wiki.ok.com/api): ").strip()
        bs_id = prompt("в”ғ вқҜ BookStack Token ID: ").strip()
        bs_secret = prompt("в”ғ вқҜ BookStack Token Secret (pwd): ", is_password=True).strip()
        use_gws = prompt("в”ғ вқҜ USE GWS CLI(y/n)? [n]: ").strip().lower() == 'y'
        
        with open(cred_file, "w") as f:
            f.write("[default]\n")
            f.write(f"GEMINI_API_KEY={gemini_key}\n")
            f.write("GEMINI_MODEL_PRO=gemini-2.5-pro\n")
            f.write("GEMINI_MODEL_FLASH=gemini-2.5-flash\n")
            f.write(f"BOOKSTACK_API_URL={bs_url}\n")
            f.write(f"BOOKSTACK_TOKEN_ID={bs_id}\n")
            f.write(f"BOOKSTACK_TOKEN_SECRET={bs_secret}\n")
            f.write(f"USE_GWS_CLI={'true' if use_gws else 'false'}\n")
        console.print("в”Ј [green]кёҖлЎңлІҢ мқёмҰқ м ҖмһҘ мҷ„лЈҢ:[/green] ~/.arti-ops/credentials")
    except EOFError:
        console.print("в”Ј [yellow]м„Өм •мқҙ м·ЁмҶҢлҗҳм—ҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.[/yellow]")
    except KeyboardInterrupt:
        console.print("в”Ј [yellow]м„Өм •мқҙ м·ЁмҶҢлҗҳм—ҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.[/yellow]")

@app.command
def init():
    """
    arti-ops лҘј м „м—ӯм ҒмңјлЎң мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳкё° мң„н•ң кёҖлЎңлІҢ(+лЎңм»¬) нҷҳкІҪмқ„ мҠӨмәҗнҸҙл”©(мҙҲкё°нҷ”)н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
    """
    console.print(Panel("[bold cyan]arti-ops мҙҲкё°нҷ” л§ҲлІ•мӮ¬[/bold cyan]"))
    
    # 1. лЎңм»¬ л””л үнҶ лҰ¬ мҠӨмәҗнҸҙл”©
    Path(".agents/rules").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    Path(".agents/skills").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    console.print("в”Ј [green]лЎңм»¬ нҸҙлҚ” мғқм„ұ мҷ„лЈҢ:[/green] .agents/rules, .agents/skills")
    
    # 2. лЎңм»¬ м„Өм • (.artiops.toml) мһ‘м„ұ
    local_conf = Path(".artiops.toml")
    if not local_conf.exists():
        current_dir = Path.cwd().name
        with open(local_conf, "w") as f:
            f.write(f'current_project_id = "{current_dir}"\n')
        console.print(f"в”Ј [green]лЎңм»¬ мӢқлі„мһҗ мғқм„ұ мҷ„лЈҢ:[/green] .artiops.toml (project_id='{current_dir}')")
    
    # 3. кёҖлЎңлІҢ м„Өм • н”„лЎ¬н”„нҠё
    home_dir = Path.home() / ".arti-ops"
    cred_file = home_dir / "credentials"
    if not cred_file.exists():
        console.print("в”Ј [dim]кёҖлЎңлІҢ мқёмҰқ м •ліҙк°Җ м—ҶмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ (мІҳмқҢ 1нҡҢл§Ң мһ…л Ҙ).[/dim]")
        setup()
            
    console.print("в”— [bold green]лӘЁл“  мӨҖл№„к°Җ мҷ„лЈҢлҗҳм—ҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ! мқҙм ң `arti-ops` лӘ…л №м–ҙлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм„ёмҡ”.[/bold green]")


@app.default
def main_cli(workspace: Optional[str] = None, agent: str = "antigravity"):
    """
    нҳ„мһ¬ кІҪлЎңмҷҖ BookStack м •мұ…мқ„ м°ёмЎ°н•ҳм—¬ м—җмқҙм „нҠё нҷҳкІҪмқ„ лҢҖнҷ”нҳ•мңјлЎң мғқм„ұн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
    """
    # кёҖлЎңлІҢ мқёмҰқ м •ліҙ мЎҙмһ¬ м—¬л¶Җ мӮ¬м „ кІҖмҰқ (Guard)
    cred_file = Path.home() / ".arti-ops" / "credentials"
    if not cred_file.exists():
        console.print(Panel(
            "[bold red]кёҖлЎңлІҢ мқёмҰқ м •ліҙк°Җ м„Өм •лҗҳм§Җ м•Ҡм•ҳмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.[/bold red]\n\n"
            "arti-ops лҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳл Өл©ҙ лЁјм Җ кёҖлЎңлІҢ мқёмҰқ(Gemini API Key, BookStack л“ұ)мқ„ л“ұлЎқн•ҙм•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.\n"
            "м•„лһҳ лӘ…л №м–ҙлҘј мӢӨн–үн•ҳм—¬ мҙҲкё° м„Өм •мқ„ мҷ„лЈҢн•ҳм„ёмҡ”:\n\n"
            "  [bold cyan]$ arti-ops setup[/bold cyan]",
            title="вҡ  м„Өм • н•„мҡ”", border_style="red"
        ))
        return

    config = Configurator.get_instance()
    
    if not workspace:
        workspace = config.project_id or os.path.basename(os.path.abspath(os.getcwd()))
        
    asyncio.run(run_interactive_loop(workspace, agent))

def main():
    log_dir = os.path.expanduser("~/.arti-ops/logs")
    os.makedirs(log_dir, exist_ok=True)
    log_file = os.path.join(log_dir, "arti-ops-cli.log")
    
    logging.basicConfig(
        filename=log_file,
        level=logging.INFO,
        format="%(asctime)s - %(name)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s"
    )
    app()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()


================================================================================
File: src/arti_ops/config.py
================================================================================
import os
import shutil
import subprocess
import configparser
from pathlib import Path
import toml
import logging

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

class Configurator:
    """arti-ops кі„мёөм Ғ м„Өм • лӘЁл“Ҳ
    Global Auth: ~/.arti-ops/credentials (INI)
    Local Config: <cwd>/.artiops.toml (TOML)
    """
    _instance = None
    
    def __init__(self):
        self.global_config = {}
        self.local_config = {}
        self.project_id = None
        self.db_path = None
        
    @classmethod
    def get_instance(cls):
        if cls._instance is None:
            cls._instance = cls()
            cls._instance.load()
        return cls._instance

    def load(self):
        # 1. Load Global Auth
        home_dir = Path.home()
        arti_ops_dir = home_dir / ".arti-ops"
        arti_ops_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        
        credentials_file = arti_ops_dir / "credentials"
        if credentials_file.exists():
            parser = configparser.ConfigParser()
            parser.read(credentials_file)
            if 'default' in parser:
                self.global_config = dict(parser['default'])
                
        # 2. Setup Global DB Path
        self.db_path = f"sqlite:///{arti_ops_dir}/arti_ops_session.db"

        # 3. Load Local Project Config
        local_file = Path.cwd() / ".artiops.toml"
        if local_file.exists():
            try:
                self.local_config = toml.load(local_file)
                self.project_id = self.local_config.get("current_project_id")
            except Exception as e:
                logger.error(f"Failed to parse .artiops.toml: {e}")
                
        # 4. Fallback Project ID
        if not self.project_id:
            self.project_id = Path.cwd().name

        # 5. GWS Validation if enabled
        if str(self.get("USE_GWS_CLI", "false")).lower() == "true":
            self._validate_gws()
            
        # 6. Inject SDK required env variables
        api_key = self.get("GEMINI_API_KEY")
        if api_key:
            os.environ["GEMINI_API_KEY"] = api_key
            
    def _validate_gws(self):
        if not shutil.which("gws"):
            logger.warning("[WARNING] USE_GWS_CLI is enabled, but 'gws' binary is not found in PATH.")
            return
            
        try:
            res = subprocess.run(["gws", "--version"], capture_output=True, text=True, check=False)
            if res.returncode != 0:
                logger.warning("[WARNING] 'gws' CLI returned non-zero exit code. Validation failed.")
        except Exception as e:
            logger.warning(f"[WARNING] Failed to execute 'gws' CLI: {e}")

    def get(self, key: str, default=None):
        # 1. Local first
        if key in self.local_config:
            return self.local_config[key]
        # 2. Global second (configparser uses lowercase keys by default)
        return self.global_config.get(key.lower(), default)
        
    def get_db_url(self):
        return self.db_path

def get_config(key: str, default=None):
    return Configurator.get_instance().get(key, default)

def get_db_url():
    return Configurator.get_instance().get_db_url()

def get_project_id():
    return Configurator.get_instance().project_id


================================================================================
File: src/arti_ops/core/__init__.py
================================================================================


================================================================================
File: src/arti_ops/core/pipeline.py
================================================================================
import os
import re
import asyncio
import logging
from typing import AsyncGenerator
from google.adk import Runner, Agent
from google.adk.tools import FunctionTool
from google.adk.sessions.sqlite_session_service import SqliteSessionService
from google.genai.types import Content, Part

from ..agents.profiler import get_profiler_agent
from ..agents.architect import get_architect_agent
from ..agents.verifier import get_verifier_agent
from ..agents.executor import get_executor_agent

from ..tools.bookstack import BookStackToolset
from ..tools.gws_chat import GwsChatTool
from ..tools.file_io import FileIOToolset

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

class ArtiOpsPipeline:
    def __init__(self, target_project_id: str):
        self.target_project_id = target_project_id
        
        self.ui_queue = asyncio.Queue()
        BookStackToolset.set_ui_queue(self.ui_queue)
        from ..tools.file_io import FileIOToolset
        FileIOToolset.set_ui_queue(self.ui_queue)
        
        # 1. нҲҙ м„ м–ё (SandboxTool м ңкұ°лҗЁ)
        self.bookstack_tool = BookStackToolset()
        self.file_io_tool = FileIOToolset()
        self.gws_chat_tool = GwsChatTool()
        send_summary_tool = FunctionTool(func=self.gws_chat_tool.send_summary)
        
        # 2. м—җмқҙм „нҠё м„ м–ё (Profilerм—җ лЎңм»¬ мҠӨмә” к¶Ңн•ң л¶Җм—¬)
        self.profiler = get_profiler_agent(tools=[self.bookstack_tool, self.file_io_tool])
        self.architect = get_architect_agent(tools=[]) 
        self.verifier = get_verifier_agent(tools=[])
        self.executor = get_executor_agent(tools=[self.file_io_tool, self.bookstack_tool, send_summary_tool])
        
        from arti_ops.config import Configurator
        config = Configurator.get_instance()
        # м„ём…ҳ м„ңл№„мҠӨ м„Өм •: Global DB мӮ¬мҡ© (session_id лЎң кө¬л¶„лҗЁ)
        db_path = str(os.path.expanduser("~/.arti-ops/arti_ops_session.db"))
        self.session_service = SqliteSessionService(db_path=db_path)
        
        self._pause_event = asyncio.Event()
        self._is_approved = False
        self._human_feedback = ""

    def _create_runner(self, agent: Agent) -> Runner:
        return Runner(
            app_name=f"arti-ops-{agent.name}",
            agent=agent,
            session_service=self.session_service,
            auto_create_session=True
        )

    async def run(self, command_prompt: str, session_id: str = None) -> AsyncGenerator[any, None]:
        session_id = session_id or f"sess_{self.target_project_id}"
        current_input = command_prompt
        
        async def pump_runner(runner, **kwargs):
            try:
                async for e in runner.run_async(**kwargs):
                    await self.ui_queue.put({"type": "runner_event", "data": e})
            finally:
                await self.ui_queue.put({"type": "runner_done"})

        # [1] Profiler Phase
        yield {"type": "phase_start", "agent": "context_profiler", "message": "лЎңм»¬ нҢҢмқј кө¬мЎ° л°Ҹ мң„нӮӨ м •мұ… мҲҳм§‘ мӨ‘..."}
        runner_prof = self._create_runner(self.profiler)
        prof_text = ""
        tool_called = False
        
        asyncio.create_task(pump_runner(runner_prof, user_id="cli_user", session_id=session_id, new_message=Content(role="user", parts=[Part.from_text(text=current_input)])))
        
        while True:
            q_evt = await self.ui_queue.get()
            import logging
            logging.getLogger(__name__).info(f"====== [DEBUG PIPELINE] Pulled from ui_queue: {q_evt['type']} ======")
            
            if q_evt["type"] == "runner_done":
                break
            elif q_evt["type"] == "ui_message":
                tool_called = True
                logging.getLogger(__name__).info(f"====== [DEBUG PIPELINE] Yielding UI message: {q_evt['data']} ======")
                yield q_evt["data"]
            elif q_evt["type"] == "runner_event":
                event = q_evt["data"]
                if hasattr(event, "function_calls") and event.function_calls:
                    for call in event.function_calls:
                        tool_called = True
                        yield {"type": "tool_call", "agent": "context_profiler", "tool_name": call.name}
                if getattr(event, "content", None) and event.content.parts:
                    prof_text += "".join([p.text for p in event.content.parts if p.text])
                
        if not tool_called and prof_text.strip():
            yield {
                "type": "subnode_add",
                "agent": "context_profiler",
                "message": "рҹ’Ў мқҙм „ м„ём…ҳ(sessions.db) кё°м–өмқ„ л¶Ҳлҹ¬мҷ”мҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.",
                "color": "magenta"
            }
            
        yield {"type": "phase_end", "agent": "context_profiler", "status": "success"}
        current_input = f"[Profiler м»Ён…ҚмҠӨнҠё ліҙкі м„ң]\n{prof_text}\n\nмң„ лӮҙмҡ©мқ„ м°ёкі н•ҳм—¬ мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗмқҳ мҙҲкё° м§ҖмӢңлҘј мҷ„мҲҳн•ҳм„ёмҡ”." if prof_text else current_input
        
        # [2] Architect & Verifier Loop
        max_retries = 3
        retry_count = 0
        verifier_passed = False
        
        while retry_count < max_retries and not verifier_passed:
            # Architect Phase
            yield {"type": "phase_start", "agent": "skill_architect", "message": f"{retry_count+1}м°Ё л§һм¶Өнҳ• мҠӨнӮ¬/лЈ° кё°нҡҚ мӨ‘..."}
            runner_arch = self._create_runner(self.architect)
            arch_text = ""
            reported_paths = set()
            
            async for event in runner_arch.run_async(user_id="cli_user", session_id=session_id, new_message=Content(role="user", parts=[Part.from_text(text=current_input)])):
                if getattr(event, "content", None) and event.content.parts:
                    chunk = "".join([p.text for p in event.content.parts if p.text])
                    arch_text += chunk
                    
                    # мӢӨмӢңк°„ нҢҢмӢұ: .agents/rules/xxx.md лҳҗлҠ” .agents/skills/xxx/SKILL.md кІҪлЎң к°җм§Җ
                    matches = re.findall(r'(\.agents/(?:rules|skills)/[\w\-\./]+\.md)', arch_text)
                    for match in matches:
                        if match not in reported_paths:
                            reported_paths.add(match)
                            yield {
                                "type": "subnode_add",
                                "agent": "skill_architect",
                                "message": f"рҹ“қ кё°нҡҚ нғҖкІҹ: {match}",
                                "color": "yellow"
                            }
                            
            yield {"type": "phase_end", "agent": "skill_architect", "status": "success"}
            
            # Verifier Phase
            yield {"type": "phase_start", "agent": "critical_verifier", "message": "м •мұ… л¬ҙкІ°м„ұ кІҖмҰқ л°Ҹ мөңмў… ліҙкі м„ң мһ‘м„ұ мӨ‘..."}
            runner_ver = self._create_runner(self.verifier)
            ver_text = ""
            
            async for event in runner_ver.run_async(user_id="cli_user", session_id=session_id, new_message=Content(role="user", parts=[Part.from_text(text=f"[Architect кё°нҡҚм•Ҳ]\n{arch_text}\n\nкІҖмҰқ нӣ„ мөңмў… ліҙкі м„ңлҘј мһ‘м„ұн•ҳм„ёмҡ”.")])):
                if getattr(event, "content", None) and event.content.parts:
                    ver_text += "".join([p.text for p in event.content.parts if p.text])

            # мӢӨнҢЁ нӮӨмӣҢл“ң кІҖмӮ¬ (л„Ҳл¬ҙ лӢЁмҲңн•ң нӮӨмӣҢл“ң л§Өм№ӯмқҖ мғқм„ұлҗң ліёл¬ё лӮҙмҡ©м—җ кұёл Ө мҳӨнғҗСҖРёСӮлҗ  мҲҳ мһҲмңјлҜҖлЎң, кІҖнҶ  кІ°кіј м„№м…ҳм—җ н•ңм •н•ҳкұ°лӮҳ лҚ” лӘ…мӢңм Ғмқё н‘ңнҳ„мқ„ м°ҫлҸ„лЎқ мҷ„нҷ”н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.)
            is_rejected = False
            # мІ« л¶Җл¶„мқҙлӮҳ м „мІҙм Ғмқё л§ҘлқҪм—җм„ң 'мҠ№мқё кұ°м Ҳ', 'кІҖнҶ  мӢӨнҢЁ', 'л°ҳл Өн•©лӢҲлӢӨ' л“ұ л…ёкіЁм Ғмқё кұ°л¶Җ мқҳмӮ¬к°Җ мһҲлҠ”м§Җ нҷ•мқё. ліёл¬ём—җ нҸ¬н•Ёлҗң лӢЁмҲң лӢЁм–ҙлҠ” л¬ҙмӢң.
            fail_phrases = ["кІҖнҶ  кІ°кіј: л°ҳл Ө", "кІҖнҶ  кІ°кіј: мӢӨнҢЁ", "кІ°кіј: л°ҳл Ө", "кІ°кіј: мӢӨнҢЁ", "мҠ№мқё кұ°л¶Җ", "мҠ№мқё л¶Ҳк°Җ"]
            if any(kw in ver_text for kw in fail_phrases):
                is_rejected = True
                
            if is_rejected:
                retry_count += 1
                current_input = f"[Verifier л°ҳл Ө мӮ¬мң ]\n{ver_text}\n\nмң„ л°ҳл Ө мӮ¬мң лҘј л°”нғ•мңјлЎң мӮ°м¶ңл¬јмқ„ мҲҳм •н•ҳм—¬ мһ¬кё°нҡҚн•ҳм„ёмҡ”."
                yield {"type": "phase_end", "agent": "critical_verifier", "status": "failed"}
            else:
                yield {"type": "phase_end", "agent": "critical_verifier", "status": "success"}
                # мөңмў… к°•м ң кІҖнҶ  лҢҖкё° (Mandatory HITL)
                self._pause_event.clear()
                yield {
                    "status": "pending_final_approval", 
                    "report": ver_text
                }
                
                await self._pause_event.wait()
                
                if not self._is_approved:
                    verifier_passed = False
                    retry_count += 1
                    current_input = f"[мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗ н”јл“ңл°ұ (мҲҳм • м§ҖмӢң)]\n{self._human_feedback}\n\nмң„ мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗ н”јл“ңл°ұмқ„ м „л¶Җ л°ҳмҳҒн•ҳм—¬ кё°нҡҚм•Ҳмқ„ лӢӨмӢң мһ‘м„ұн•ҳм„ёмҡ”."
                    continue
                else:
                    verifier_passed = True
                    current_input = f"[мөңмў… мҠ№мқёлҗң кё°нҡҚм•Ҳ (мӣҗліё мҪ”л“ң)]\n{arch_text}\n\n[кІҖмҰқ кІ°кіј мҡ”м•Ҫ]\n{ver_text}\n\nмң„ мҠ№мқёлҗң кё°нҡҚм•Ҳ(мӣҗліё мҪ”л“ң)мқҳ лӮҙмҡ©мқ„ л°”нғ•мңјлЎң лЎңм»¬ нҢҢмқј м“°кё°(`write_file` лҸ„кө¬ мӮ¬мҡ©)лҘј мҲҳн–үн•ҳм„ёмҡ”. нҢҢмқј мғқм„ұ мӢң лӮҙмҡ©(content) мқёмһҗм—җлҠ” мҡ”м•Ҫл¬ёмқҙ м•„лӢҢ мӣҗліё л§ҲнҒ¬лӢӨмҡҙ/мҪ”л“ң м „мІҙк°Җ л°ҳл“ңмӢң нҸ¬н•Ёлҗҳм–ҙм•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ."
                
        if not verifier_passed:
            return
            
        # [3] Executor Phase
        yield {"type": "phase_start", "agent": "deployment_executor", "message": "мӢӨм ң лЎңм»¬ нҢҢмқј I/O л°°нҸ¬ м§„н–ү мӨ‘..."}
        runner_exe = self._create_runner(self.executor)
        
        async for event in runner_exe.run_async(user_id="cli_user", session_id=session_id, new_message=Content(role="user", parts=[Part.from_text(text=current_input)])):
            if hasattr(event, "function_calls") and event.function_calls:
                for call in event.function_calls:
                    yield {"type": "tool_call", "agent": "deployment_executor", "tool_name": call.name}
                    
        yield {"type": "phase_end", "agent": "deployment_executor", "status": "success"}

    async def resume(self, session_id: str, action_response: dict) -> None:
        self._is_approved = action_response.get("approved", False)
        self._human_feedback = action_response.get("feedback", "")
        self._pause_event.set()


================================================================================
File: src/arti_ops/tools/__init__.py
================================================================================


================================================================================
File: src/arti_ops/tools/bookstack.py
================================================================================
import os
import httpx
import logging
import asyncio
from typing import Optional, Dict, Any
from google.adk.tools import BaseTool, FunctionTool
from google.adk.tools.base_toolset import BaseToolset
from arti_ops.config import get_config

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
from pydantic import ConfigDict, Field

class BookStackToolset(BaseToolset):
    """
    BookStack API нҶөн•©мқ„ мң„н•ң ADK Toolset.
    Global(L1) л°Ҹ Workspace(L2) м •мұ…мқ„ л§ҲнҒ¬лӢӨмҡҙ нҳ•нғңлЎң к°Җм ёмҳӨкі , 
    л°°нҸ¬ кІ°кіјлҘј Release NotesлЎң нҚјлё”лҰ¬мӢңн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
    """
    _ui_queue: Any = None # нҒҙлһҳмҠӨ ліҖмҲҳлЎң м„ м–ён•ҳм—¬ ліөм ң мӢңм—җлҸ„ м°ёмЎ° мң м§Җ

    @classmethod
    def set_ui_queue(cls, queue: asyncio.Queue):
        cls._ui_queue = queue

    def __init__(self, **kwargs):
        super().__init__(**kwargs)
        self.api_url = get_config("BOOKSTACK_API_URL", "")
        self.token_id = get_config("BOOKSTACK_TOKEN_ID", "")
        self.token_secret = get_config("BOOKSTACK_TOKEN_SECRET", "")

    model_config = ConfigDict(arbitrary_types_allowed=True)
    
    async def get_tools(self, context=None) -> list[BaseTool]:
        """ADK м—җмқҙм „нҠёк°Җ нҳём¶ңн•  кё°лҠҘл“Өмқҳ FunctionTool лҰ¬мҠӨнҠёлҘј л°ҳнҷҳн•©лӢҲлӢӨ."""
        return [
            FunctionTool(func=self.fetch_policies),
            FunctionTool(func=self.publish_sync_report)
        ]
    
    def get_headers(self) -> Dict[str, str]:
        """BookStack API мқёмҰқ н—ӨлҚ”лҘј л°ҳнҷҳн•©лӢҲлӢӨ."""
        return {
            "Authorization": f"Token {self.token_id}:{self.token_secret}",
            "Content-Type": "application/json"
        }

    async def fetch_policies(self, scope_tag: str, project_id: Optional[str] = None) -> str:
        """
        BookStackм—җм„ң нҠ№м • Scope(L1/L2)мқҳ л§ҲнҒ¬лӢӨмҡҙ м •мұ… л¬ём„ңлҘј мЎ°нҡҢн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
        
        Args:
            scope_tag (str): 'global' (L1) лҳҗлҠ” 'workspace' (L2) 
            project_id (Optional[str]): workspace scopeмқё кІҪмҡ° мЎ°нҡҢн•  н”„лЎңм қнҠёмқҳ кі мң  мӢқлі„мһҗ
            
        Returns:
            str: л§ҲнҒ¬лӢӨмҡҙ н…ҚмҠӨнҠё нҳ•нғңмқҳ м •мұ… л¬ём„ң
        """
        if scope_tag == "workspace" and not project_id:
            return "Error: Workspace scope requires a project_id."
            
        book_slug = "antigravity-global-policy" if scope_tag == "global" else f"workspace-{project_id}"
            
        async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
            headers = self.get_headers()
            combined_markdown = []
            
            try:
                # 1. лҢҖмғҒ мұ…(Book) ID мЎ°нҡҢ
                books_url = f"{self.api_url}/books"
                books_res = await client.get(books_url, headers=headers, params={"filter[slug]": book_slug})
                books_res.raise_for_status()
                books_data = books_res.json().get("data", [])
                
                if not books_data:
                    return f"Error: Book not found for slug '{book_slug}'"
                
                book_id = books_data[0]["id"]
                
                # 2. мұ… мғҒм„ё м •ліҙ мЎ°нҡҢ (н•ҳмң„ мұ•н„° л°Ҹ нҺҳмқҙм§Җ нҠёлҰ¬ кө¬мЎ° нҡҚл“қ)
                book_detail_url = f"{self.api_url}/books/{book_id}"
                book_detail_res = await client.get(book_detail_url, headers=headers)
                book_detail_res.raise_for_status()
                
                contents = book_detail_res.json().get("contents", [])
                
                # 3. rules, skills мұ•н„° нғҗмғү
                for target in ["rules", "skills"]:
                    chapter = next((c for c in contents if c.get("type") == "chapter" and c.get("slug") == target), None)
                    
                    if not chapter:
                        logger.warning(f"====== [BookStack API] No '{target}' chapter found in '{book_slug}' ======")
                        combined_markdown.append(f"<!-- No {target} chapter found in {book_slug} -->")
                        continue
                        
                    combined_markdown.append(f"## {target.capitalize()} ({scope_tag.capitalize()})\n")
                    
                    # 4. мұ•н„°м—җ мҶҢмҶҚлҗң нҺҳмқҙм§Җл“Өмқҳ л§ҲнҒ¬лӢӨмҡҙ лӮҙмҡ©мқ„ кёҒм–ҙмҳҙ
                    pages = chapter.get("pages", [])
                    if not pages:
                        combined_markdown.append(f"<!-- No pages in {target} chapter -->")
                        continue
                        
                    for page_info in pages:
                        page_id = page_info["id"]
                        page_name = page_info.get("name", f"page_{page_id}")
                        page_url = f"{self.api_url}/pages/{page_id}"
                        page_res = await client.get(page_url, headers=headers)
                        page_res.raise_for_status()
                        
                        md_content = page_res.json().get("markdown", "")
                        
                        # [NEW] Extract and save attached scripts from markdown Fenced Code Blocks
                        import re
                        pattern = r'````(\w+)\s+filepath="([^"]+)"\r?\n(.*?)\r?\n````'
                        matches = list(re.finditer(pattern, md_content, re.DOTALL))
                        
                        if matches:
                            base_skill_dir = os.path.join(os.getcwd(), f".agents/{target}/{page_name}")
                            for match in matches:
                                lang, filepath, script_content = match.groups()
                                full_path = os.path.normpath(os.path.join(base_skill_dir, filepath))
                                
                                # ліҙм•Ҳ кІҖмӮ¬ (л””л үнҶ лҰ¬ мқҙнғҲ л°©м§Җ)
                                if os.path.commonpath([base_skill_dir, full_path]) == base_skill_dir:
                                    os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(full_path), exist_ok=True)
                                    with open(full_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as sf:
                                        sf.write(script_content)
                                    logger.info(f"Extracting script: {full_path}")
                                
                                md_content = md_content.replace(match.group(0), "")
                                
                            # м •лҰ¬
                            md_content = md_content.replace("### рҹӣ пёҸ Scripts & Dependencies", "").strip()
                            # м°Ңкәјкё° кіөл°ұ м ңм–ҙ
                            md_content = re.sub(r'---\n+$', '', md_content).strip()

                        # лӘ…мӢңм Ғмқё лЎңм»¬ л§Өн•‘ кІҪлЎң мЈјмһ…
                        if target == "rules":
                            expected_path = f".agents/{target}/{page_name}.md"
                        else:  # skills л“ұ кё°нғҖ
                            expected_path = f".agents/{target}/{page_name}/SKILL.md"
                        combined_markdown.append(f"### {page_name} (Expected Path: {expected_path})\n\n{md_content}")
                        
                        logger.info(f"====== [DEBUG UI_QUEUE] type is: {type(self._ui_queue)} ======")
                        if getattr(self, "_ui_queue", None):
                            await self._ui_queue.put({
                                "type": "ui_message",
                                "data": {
                                    "type": "subnode_add",
                                    "agent": "context_profiler",
                                    "message": f"вҳҒпёҸ мң„нӮӨ м—°лҸҷ: {expected_path}",
                                    "color": "cyan"
                                }
                            })
                            logger.info(f"====== [DEBUG UI_QUEUE] put message to ui_queue for {page_name}.md ======")
                        else:
                            logger.error(f"====== [DEBUG UI_QUEUE] ui_queue is NONE for {page_name}.md! ======")
                        
                        logger.info(f"====== [BookStack API] Fetched Page '{page_name}' in Chapter '{target}' ======\n{md_content}\n=======================================================")
                
                return "\n\n".join(combined_markdown)
                
            except Exception as e:
                logger.error(f"====== [BookStack API] Error connecting for '{book_slug}': {str(e)} ======")
                logger.error("BookStack мқёмҰқ м •ліҙлҘј м°ҫмқ„ мҲҳ м—ҶмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. .artiops.toml л°Ҹ кёҖлЎңлІҢ мқёмҰқ нҢҢмқјмқ„ нҷ•мқён•ҳм„ёмҡ”.")
                return f"Error connecting to BookStack API: {str(e)}"

    async def publish_sync_report(self, project_id: str, diff_md: str) -> str:
        """
        л°°нҸ¬лҗң мөңмӢ  лЈ°кіј DiffлҘј BookStackмқҳ Release Note нҺҳмқҙм§Җм—җ м—…лҚ°мқҙнҠён•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
        
        Args:
            project_id (str): лҢҖмғҒ н”„лЎңм қнҠё мӢқлі„мһҗ
            diff_md (str): л§ҲнҒ¬лӢӨмҡҙ нҳ•мӢқмқҳ Sync лҰ¬нҸ¬нҠё/Diff лӮҙмҡ©
            
        Returns:
            str: м—…лҚ°мқҙнҠё кІ°кіј л©”м„ём§Җ
        """
        async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
            headers = self.get_headers()
            search_query = f"[Workspace] {project_id} Release Notes"
            search_url = f"{self.api_url}/search"
            params = {"query": f'"{search_query}" +type:page'}
            
            try:
                res = await client.get(search_url, headers=headers, params=params)
                res.raise_for_status()
                data = res.json().get("data", [])
                
                if not data:
                    return f"No Release Notes page found for {project_id}. Please create a page named '{search_query}' first."
                    
                page_id = data[0].get("id")
                
                # нҺҳмқҙм§Җ лӮҙмҡ© к°Җм ёмҳӨкё° (GET)
                page_url = f"{self.api_url}/pages/{page_id}"
                get_res = await client.get(page_url, headers=headers)
                get_res.raise_for_status()
                existing_markdown = get_res.json().get("markdown", "")
                
                # лӮҙмҡ© мқҙм–ҙл¶ҷмқҙкё° (Append)
                updated_markdown = f"{existing_markdown}\n\n---\n\n## New Deployment\n\n{diff_md}"
                
                # нҺҳмқҙм§Җ лӮҙмҡ© лҚ®м–ҙм“°кё° (PUT)
                payload = {
                    "markdown": updated_markdown
                }
                
                put_res = await client.put(page_url, headers=headers, json=payload)
                put_res.raise_for_status()
                
                return f"Successfully updated Release Notes for project {project_id}"
                
            except Exception as e:
                return f"Error publishing sync report: {str(e)}"

    async def create_workspace_book(self, project_id: str) -> bool:
        """мғҲлЎңмҡҙ мӣҢнҒ¬мҠӨнҺҳмқҙмҠӨмҡ© мұ…(Book)кіј н•„мҲҳ мұ•н„°(rules, skills)лҘј мғқм„ұн•©лӢҲлӢӨ."""
        book_name = f"[Workspace] {project_id}"
        
        async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
            headers = self.get_headers()
            try:
                # 1. мұ… мғқм„ұ
                url = f"{self.api_url}/books"
                payload = {
                    "name": book_name,
                    "description": f"Auto-generated workspace book for {project_id}"
                }
                res = await client.post(url, headers=headers, json=payload)
                res.raise_for_status()
                book_id = res.json()["id"]
                
                # 2. н•„мҲҳ мұ•н„° мғқм„ұ
                chapters_url = f"{self.api_url}/chapters"
                for target in ["rules", "skills"]:
                    chap_payload = {
                        "book_id": book_id,
                        "name": target,
                        "description": f"Agent {target} storage"
                    }
                    c_res = await client.post(chapters_url, headers=headers, json=chap_payload)
                    c_res.raise_for_status()
                    
                # 3. лҰҙлҰ¬мҰҲ л…ёнҠё нҺҳмқҙм§Җ мҠӨмәҗнҸҙл”© (лЈЁнҠём—җ мғқм„ұ)
                page_url = f"{self.api_url}/pages"
                page_payload = {
                    "book_id": book_id,
                    "name": f"[Workspace] {project_id} Release Notes",
                    "markdown": f"# Release Notes\n\nAutomated deployments for {project_id} will be recorded here."
                }
                p_res = await client.post(page_url, headers=headers, json=page_payload)
                p_res.raise_for_status()
                
                logger.info(f"Successfully created workspace book and structure for {project_id}")
                return True
                
            except Exception as e:
                logger.error(f"Failed to create workspace book: {e}")
                raise ValueError(f"мӣҢнҒ¬мҠӨнҺҳмқҙмҠӨ мғқм„ұ мӢӨнҢЁ: {e}")

    async def get_upsert_plan(self, project_id: str) -> list[dict]:
        """лЎңм»¬ .agents лҚ°мқҙн„°лҘј мҠӨмә”н•ҳкі  BookStackкіј л№„көҗн•ҳм—¬ л°°нҸ¬ кі„нҡҚмқ„ мғқм„ұн•©лӢҲлӢӨ."""
        plan = []
        book_slug = f"workspace-{project_id}"
        
        async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
            headers = self.get_headers()
            try:
                # 1. лҢҖмғҒ мұ…(Book) ID мЎ°нҡҢ
                books_url = f"{self.api_url}/books"
                books_res = await client.get(books_url, headers=headers, params={"filter[slug]": book_slug})
                books_res.raise_for_status()
                books_data = books_res.json().get("data", [])
                
                if not books_data:
                    error_msg = f"BookStackм—җм„ң '{book_slug}' мқҙлҰ„мқҳ мұ…(Book)мқ„ м°ҫмқ„ мҲҳ м—ҶмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. мң„нӮӨм—җ м ‘мҶҚн•ҳм—¬ н•ҙлӢ№ н”„лЎңм қнҠёлӘ…мңјлЎң мұ…мқ„ лЁјм Җ мғқм„ұн•ҙмЈјм„ёмҡ”."
                    logger.error(error_msg)
                    raise ValueError(error_msg)
                book_id = books_data[0]["id"]
                
                # 2. мұ… мғҒм„ё м •ліҙ мЎ°нҡҢ (н•ҳмң„ мұ•н„° нҡҚл“қ)
                book_detail_url = f"{self.api_url}/books/{book_id}"
                book_detail_res = await client.get(book_detail_url, headers=headers)
                book_detail_res.raise_for_status()
                contents = book_detail_res.json().get("contents", [])
                
                chapters = {
                    "rules": next((c for c in contents if c.get("type") == "chapter" and c.get("slug") == "rules"), None),
                    "skills": next((c for c in contents if c.get("type") == "chapter" and c.get("slug") == "skills"), None)
                }

                # 3. лЎңм»¬ нҢҢмқј мҠӨмә” л°Ҹ л№„көҗ
                base_dir = os.path.join(os.getcwd(), ".agents")
                targets = [
                    ("rules", os.path.join(base_dir, "rules")),
                    ("skills", os.path.join(base_dir, "skills"))
                ]
                
                for target_type, target_dir in targets:
                    chapter = chapters.get(target_type)
                    if not chapter:
                        logger.warning(f"No {target_type} chapter found in {book_slug}.")
                        continue
                        
                    chapter_id = chapter["id"]
                    
                    # мұ•н„° мғҒм„ё APIлҘј нҳём¶ңн•ҳм—¬ м •нҷ•н•ң н•ҳмң„ нҺҳмқҙм§• м •ліҙлҘј к°Җм ёмҳЁлӢӨ (лІ„к·ё н”ҪмҠӨ)
                    chapter_detail_url = f"{self.api_url}/chapters/{chapter_id}"
                    chap_res = await client.get(chapter_detail_url, headers=headers)
                    chap_res.raise_for_status()
                    chapter_detail = chap_res.json()
                    
                    existing_pages = {p["name"]: p["id"] for p in chapter_detail.get("pages", [])}
                    
                    if not os.path.exists(target_dir):
                        continue
                        
                    if target_type == "rules":
                        for filename in os.listdir(target_dir):
                            if filename.endswith(".md"):
                                page_name = filename[:-3]
                                local_path = os.path.join(target_dir, filename)
                                rel_path = f".agents/rules/{filename}"
                                with open(local_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                                    content = f.read()
                                
                                page_id = existing_pages.get(page_name)
                                action = "Update" if page_id else "Create"
                                plan.append({
                                    "name": page_name,
                                    "type": target_type,
                                    "rel_path": rel_path,
                                    "content": content,
                                    "action": action,
                                    "chapter_id": chapter_id,
                                    "page_id": page_id
                                })
                    elif target_type == "skills":
                        for skill_name in os.listdir(target_dir):
                            skill_dir = os.path.join(target_dir, skill_name)
                            if os.path.isdir(skill_dir):
                                skill_file = os.path.join(skill_dir, "SKILL.md")
                                if os.path.exists(skill_file):
                                    rel_path = f".agents/skills/{skill_name}/SKILL.md"
                                    with open(skill_file, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                                        content = f.read()
                                        
                                    # [NEW] Append other files in skill_dir as fenced code blocks
                                    has_extra = False
                                    for root, _, files in os.walk(skill_dir):
                                        if "__pycache__" in root: continue
                                        for fname in files:
                                            if fname == "SKILL.md" or fname.endswith(".pyc") or fname.startswith("."): continue
                                            fpath = os.path.join(root, fname)
                                            sub_rel = os.path.relpath(fpath, skill_dir)
                                            
                                            try:
                                                with open(fpath, "r", encoding="utf-8") as xf:
                                                    xcontent = xf.read()
                                            except Exception:
                                                continue
                                                
                                            ext = fname.split('.')[-1] if '.' in fname else 'text'
                                            lang_map = {'py': 'python', 'sh': 'bash', 'json': 'json', 'yaml': 'yaml', 'yml': 'yaml', 'md': 'markdown', 'js': 'javascript', 'ts': 'typescript'}
                                            lang = lang_map.get(ext, ext)
                                            
                                            if not has_extra:
                                                content += "\n\n---\n### рҹӣ пёҸ Scripts & Dependencies\n"
                                                has_extra = True
                                            
                                            content += f"\n````{lang} filepath=\"{sub_rel}\"\n{xcontent}\n````\n"
                                            
                                    page_name = skill_name
                                    page_id = existing_pages.get(page_name)
                                    action = "Update" if page_id else "Create"
                                    plan.append({
                                        "name": page_name,
                                        "type": target_type,
                                        "rel_path": rel_path,
                                        "content": content,
                                        "action": action,
                                        "chapter_id": chapter_id,
                                        "page_id": page_id
                                    })
                                    
                # 4. Update лҢҖмғҒл“Өмқҳ ліёл¬ё лӮҙмҡ©мқ„ лі‘л ¬лЎң к°Җм ёмҷҖм„ң ліҖкІҪ м—¬л¶Җ(Match) нҢҗлі„
                update_items = [item for item in plan if item["action"] == "Update"]
                
                async def fetch_and_compare(item):
                    page_url = f"{self.api_url}/pages/{item['page_id']}"
                    try:
                        res = await client.get(page_url, headers=headers)
                        res.raise_for_status()
                        remote_markdown = res.json().get("markdown", "")
                        
                        # \r\n м •к·ңнҷ” нӣ„ л№„көҗ
                        if remote_markdown.replace("\r\n", "\n").strip() == item["content"].replace("\r\n", "\n").strip():
                            item["action"] = "Match"
                    except Exception as e:
                        logger.warning(f"Failed to fetch content for comparison: {e}")
                        logger.warning("Upsert Plan л№„көҗ мӨ‘ нҺҳмқҙм§Җ fetch мҳӨлҘҳ. .artiops.toml л°Ҹ кёҖлЎңлІҢ мқёмҰқ нҢҢмқјмқ„ нҷ•мқён•ҳм„ёмҡ”.")

                if update_items:
                    await asyncio.gather(*(fetch_and_compare(item) for item in update_items))
                    
            except Exception as e:
                logger.error(f"Error generating upsert plan: {e}")
                
        return plan

    async def execute_upsert(self, plan: list[dict]) -> None:
        """м„ нғқлҗң л°°нҸ¬ кі„нҡҚмқ„ мӢӨм ңлЎң BookStackм—җ мһ‘м„ұн•©лӢҲлӢӨ."""
        async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
            headers = self.get_headers()
            
            for item in plan:
                try:
                    payload = {
                        "name": item["name"],
                        "markdown": item["content"],
                        "chapter_id": item["chapter_id"]
                    }
                    if item["action"] == "Create":
                        url = f"{self.api_url}/pages"
                        res = await client.post(url, headers=headers, json=payload)
                        res.raise_for_status()
                        logger.info(f"Created page: {item['name']}")
                    elif item["action"] == "Update":
                        url = f"{self.api_url}/pages/{item['page_id']}"
                        res = await client.put(url, headers=headers, json=payload)
                        res.raise_for_status()
                        logger.info(f"Updated page: {item['name']}")
                        logger.info(f"BookStack нҺҳмқҙм§Җ м—…лҚ°мқҙнҠё мҷ„лЈҢ: {item['name']} (ID: {item['page_id']})")
                except Exception as e:
                    logger.error(f"Failed to {item['action']} page {item['name']}: {e}")
                    logger.error(f"Upsert мӢӨнҢЁ: {item['name']} (BookStack API м—җлҹ¬)")



================================================================================
File: src/arti_ops/tools/file_io.py
================================================================================
import os
import asyncio
import logging
from typing import List, Any
from google.adk.tools import BaseTool, FunctionTool
from google.adk.tools.base_toolset import BaseToolset

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

class FileIOToolset(BaseToolset):
    _ui_queue: Any = None

    @classmethod
    def set_ui_queue(cls, queue: asyncio.Queue):
        cls._ui_queue = queue
    
    async def get_tools(self, context=None) -> List[BaseTool]:
        return [
            FunctionTool(func=self.write_file),
            FunctionTool(func=self.read_file),
            FunctionTool(func=self.list_directory) # рҹҡЁ мӢ к·ң лЎңм»¬ мҠӨмә” лҸ„кө¬
        ]

    async def list_directory(self, relative_path: str = ".") -> str:
        """лӘ…л №м–ҙк°Җ мӢӨн–үлҗң лЎңм»¬ н”„лЎңм қнҠё кё°мӨҖмқҳ нҢҢмқј л°Ҹ нҸҙлҚ” кө¬мЎ°лҘј н…ҚмҠӨнҠёлЎң л°ҳнҷҳн•©лӢҲлӢӨ."""
        try:
            base_dir = os.path.abspath(os.getcwd())
            target_path = os.path.abspath(os.path.join(base_dir, relative_path))
            
            if not target_path.startswith(base_dir):
                return "Error: Security Violation."
            if not os.path.exists(target_path):
                return f"Directory '{relative_path}' does not exist."
                
            if getattr(self, "_ui_queue", None):
                await self._ui_queue.put({
                    "type": "ui_message",
                    "data": {
                        "type": "subnode_add",
                        "agent": "context_profiler",
                        "message": f"рҹ“Ӯ лЎңм»¬ нҠёлҰ¬ мҠӨмә”: {relative_path}",
                        "color": "green"
                    }
                })
                
            tree = []
            for root, dirs, files in os.walk(target_path):
                # л¶Ҳн•„мҡ”н•ң л¬ҙкұ°мҡҙ нҸҙлҚ” м ңмҷё (AI л¶Җн•ҳ л°©м§Җ)
                dirs[:] = [d for d in dirs if d not in ['.git', '__pycache__', '.venv', 'venv', 'node_modules']]
                level = root.replace(base_dir, '').count(os.sep)
                indent = ' ' * 4 * level
                tree.append(f"{indent}рҹ“Ғ {os.path.basename(root)}/")
                subindent = ' ' * 4 * (level + 1)
                for f in files:
                    tree.append(f"{subindent}рҹ“„ {f}")
            return "\n".join(tree)
        except Exception as e:
            return f"Error listing directory: {str(e)}"

    async def write_file(self, relative_path: str, content: str) -> str:
        try:
            # os.getcwd() gives the directory where the 'arti-ops' command was run
            base_dir = os.path.abspath(os.getcwd())
            
            # Remove any leading absolute slash or current-dir dot to ensure it joins correctly
            if relative_path.startswith('/'):
                relative_path = relative_path.lstrip('/')
            elif relative_path.startswith('./'):
                relative_path = relative_path[2:]
            
            # Force the relative path to start with .agents if it doesn't already
            if not relative_path.startswith('.agents/'):
                relative_path = f".agents/{relative_path}"
                
            target_path = os.path.abspath(os.path.join(base_dir, relative_path))
            
            if not target_path.startswith(os.path.join(base_dir, ".agents")):
                return "Error: Security Violation. нҢҢмқјмқҖ '.agents/' нҸҙлҚ” лӮҙл¶Җм—җл§Ң м ҖмһҘн•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ."
                
            os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(target_path), exist_ok=True)
            with open(target_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                f.write(content)
            return f"Success: нҢҢмқјмқҙ {target_path} м—җ м ҖмһҘлҗҳм—ҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ."
        except Exception as e:
            return f"Error writing file: {str(e)}"

    async def read_file(self, relative_path: str) -> str:
        try:
            target_path = os.path.abspath(relative_path)
            
            if getattr(self, "_ui_queue", None):
                await self._ui_queue.put({
                    "type": "ui_message",
                    "data": {
                        "type": "subnode_add",
                        "agent": "context_profiler",
                        "message": f"рҹ”Һ лЎңм»¬ лӮҙмҡ© лҸ…н•ҙ: {relative_path}",
                        "color": "green"
                    }
                })
            if not os.path.exists(target_path):
                return "Error: File not found."
            with open(target_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                return f.read()
        except Exception as e:
            return f"Error reading file: {str(e)}"


================================================================================
File: src/arti_ops/tools/gws_chat.py
================================================================================
import os
import asyncio
import logging
import httpx
from pydantic import ConfigDict
from google.adk.tools import BaseTool, FunctionTool
from google.adk.tools.base_toolset import BaseToolset
from arti_ops.config import get_config

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

class GwsChatTool:
    """л°°нҸ¬к°Җ лӘЁл‘җ мҷ„лЈҢлҗң нӣ„ к°ҖмһҘ л§Ҳм§Җл§үм—җ мҡ”м•Ҫ м•ҢлҰјмқ„ м „мҶЎн•ҳлҠ” лӢЁл°©н–Ҙ нҶөмӢ  нҲҙ"""
    model_config = ConfigDict(arbitrary_types_allowed=True)
    
    @property
    def check_room_id(self) -> str:
        """мқҙ нҷҳкІҪм—җм„ң мӮ¬мҡ©лҗҳлҠ” м•ҢлҰј лЈё ID"""
        return get_config("GWS_SPACE_ID", "")

    async def send_summary(self, project_id: str, summary: str) -> str:
        """мөңмў… л°°нҸ¬ нӣ„ мҡ”м•Ҫ ліҙкі м„ңлҘј GWSм—җ м „мҶЎн•©лӢҲлӢӨ."""
        if not self.check_room_id:
            logger.warning("GWS_SPACE_ID is not set. Skipped summary webhook.")
            return "Skipped (No GWS_SPACE_ID)"

        message_body = f"вң… *arti-ops л°°нҸ¬ мҷ„лЈҢ мҡ”м•Ҫ* [{project_id}]\n\n---\n{summary}\n---"
        
        try:
            env = os.environ.copy()
            process = await asyncio.create_subprocess_exec(
                "gws", "chat", "+send", "--space", self.check_room_id, "--text", message_body,
                stdout=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE, stderr=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE, env=env
            )
            stdout, stderr = await process.communicate()
            
            if process.returncode == 0:
                return f"Summary sent successfully to GWS space: {self.check_room_id}"
            else:
                return f"Failed to send summary: {stderr.decode('utf-8')}"
        except Exception as e:
            return f"Error occurred: {str(e)}"


================================================================================
File: test_dialog.py
================================================================================
import asyncio
from prompt_toolkit.shortcuts import checkboxlist_dialog

async def main():
    choices = [
        ("A", "[!] .agents/skills/test/SKILL.md\n      вҶі script.sh"),
        ("B", "[ ] .agents/skills/other/SKILL.md\n      вҶі main.py\n      вҶі test.py")
    ]
    res = await asyncio.to_thread(
        checkboxlist_dialog(
            title="Multi-line Test",
            values=choices
        ).run
    )
    print("Selected:", res)

asyncio.run(main())


================================================================================
File: tests/test_architect.py
================================================================================
import os
from google.adk import Agent
from arti_ops.agents.architect import get_architect_agent

def test_architect_agent_initialization():
    """
    Architect м—җмқҙм „нҠёк°Җ мҳ¬л°”лҘё нҢҢлқјлҜён„°лЎң мғқм„ұлҗҳлҠ”м§Җ нҷ•мқён•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
    """
    # м—җмқҙм „нҠё мғқм„ұ
    agent = get_architect_agent()
    
    # нғҖмһ… кІҖмҰқ
    assert isinstance(agent, Agent)
    
    # мҶҚм„ұ кІҖмҰқ
    assert agent.name == "skill_architect"
    assert "м •мұ… лі‘н•©кҙҖ 'Architect'" in agent.instruction
    assert ".agents/rules/" in agent.instruction
    assert ".agents/skills/" in agent.instruction
    assert agent.model == os.getenv("GEMINI_MODEL_PRO", "gemini-2.5-pro")


================================================================================
File: tests/test_architect_live.py
================================================================================
import os
import pytest
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv()

from google.genai.types import Content, Part
from google.adk import Runner
from google.adk.sessions import InMemorySessionService
from arti_ops.agents.architect import get_architect_agent

@pytest.mark.asyncio
@pytest.mark.skipif("GEMINI_API_KEY" not in os.environ, reason="Env vars are not set")
async def test_live_architect_agent_execution():
    """
    мӢӨм ң Gemini APIлҘј м—®м–ҙ Architect м—җмқҙм „нҠёк°Җ
    к°ҖмғҒмқҳ м •мұ…(L1, L2) м»Ён…ҚмҠӨнҠёлҘј л°ӣм•„ л°°нҸ¬мҡ© нҢҢмқҙмҚ¬ мҠӨнҒ¬лҰҪнҠёлҘј мһҳ л§Ңл“Өм–ҙлӮҙлҠ”м§Җ нҷ•мқён•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
    """
    # 1. нҲҙ л°Ҹ м—җмқҙм „нҠё мӨҖл№„ (ArchitectлҠ” нҲҙ м—Ҷмқҙ лӢЁлҸ… н”„лЎ¬н”„нҠё мІҳлҰ¬лЎң мӢңмһ‘ к°ҖлҠҘ)
    architect_agent = get_architect_agent()

    # 2. ADK Runner кө¬м„ұ
    runner = Runner(
        app_name="arti-ops-architect",
        agent=architect_agent,
        session_service=InMemorySessionService(),
        auto_create_session=True
    )

    # 3. н…ҢмҠӨнҠёмҡ© н”„лЎ¬н”„нҠё л°Ҹ м»Ён…ҚмҠӨнҠё (Profilerк°Җ м „лӢ¬н–ҲлӢӨкі  к°Җм •)
    prompt = """
нҳ„мһ¬ мҡ°лҰ¬лҠ” Python н”„лЎңм қнҠёлҘј кҙҖлҰ¬н•ҳкі  мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. 
м•„лһҳ мҲҳм§‘лҗң L1(Global), L2(Workspace) лЈ°мқ„ м°ёкі н•ҳм—¬ 
нҢҢмқј м“°кё°(setup_logger.py мғқм„ұ) м—ӯн• мқ„ н•ҳлҠ” л°°нҸ¬мҡ© нҢҢмқҙмҚ¬ мҠӨнҒ¬лҰҪнҠёлҘј н•ҳлӮҳ мһ‘м„ұн•ҳм„ёмҡ”.

[L1 Global Rules]
- лӘЁл“  ліҖмҲҳлӘ…мқҖ snake_caseлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©.
- лЎңк·ё м¶ңл Ҙм—җлҠ” л°ҳл“ңмӢң `logging` н‘ңмӨҖ лӘЁл“Ҳмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҙм•ј н•Ё. printл¬ё кёҲм§Җ.

[L2 Workspace Rules]
- мқҙ н”„лЎңм қнҠём—җм„ңлҠ” DEBUG л ҲлІЁмқҳ лЎңк·ёлҘј н•ӯмғҒ `project_debug.log` нҢҢмқјм—җ лӮЁкІЁм•ј н•Ё.
- нҸ¬л§·мқҖ `%(asctime)s - %(name)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s` мң м§Җ.

мң„ лЈ°мқ„ л§ҢмЎұн•ҳлҠ” лЎңкұ° м„ёнҢ… нҢҢмқҙмҚ¬ мҪ”л“ңлҘј мһ‘м„ұн•ҳлҠ” мҠӨнҒ¬лҰҪнҠёлҘј м ңкіөн•ҙ мЈјм„ёмҡ”.
м¶ңл Ҙм—җлҠ” нҢҢмқҙмҚ¬ мҪ”л“ң лё”лЎқ(```python) лӮҙмҡ©л§Ң нҸ¬н•Ён•ҙм•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
"""

    print(f"\n[Architect Request]: {prompt}")

    # 4. Agent кө¬лҸҷ л°Ҹ мҠӨнҠёлҰј мҲҳм§‘
    final_response = ""
    message_content = Content(role="user", parts=[Part.from_text(text=prompt)])

    async for event in runner.run_async(user_id="test_user", session_id="test_session", new_message=message_content):
        # Event нғҖмһ… мӨ‘ ContentлҘј нҸ¬н•Ён•ң к°қмІҙм—җм„ң л©”мӢңм§Җ мЎ°к°Ғмқ„ л№јмҳөлӢҲлӢӨ.
        if getattr(event, "content", None) and event.content.parts:
            text = "".join([part.text for part in event.content.parts if part.text])
            if text:
                final_response += text
                
    print("\n======= [Architect Agent Response] =======")
    print(final_response)
    print("=========================================\n")

    # л¬ём„ң кІҖмҰқ
    assert final_response != ""
    assert "```python" in final_response.lower() # нҢҢмқҙмҚ¬ мҪ”л“ң лё”лЎқмқҙ мһҲм–ҙм•ј н•Ё
    assert "logging" in final_response.lower() # logging лӘЁл“Ҳ мӮ¬мҡ© м§ҖмӢң мӨҖмҲҳ м—¬л¶Җ
    assert "project_debug.log" in final_response.lower() # L2 лЈ° мӨҖмҲҳ м—¬л¶Җ


================================================================================
File: tests/test_bookstack.py
================================================================================
import pytest
from unittest.mock import AsyncMock, MagicMock, patch
from arti_ops.tools.bookstack import BookStackToolset

@pytest.fixture
def bookstack_tool(monkeypatch):
    """BookStackToolset мқёмҠӨн„ҙмҠӨ н”ҪмҠӨмІҳ"""
    monkeypatch.setenv("BOOKSTACK_API_URL", "https://mock.wiki.com")
    monkeypatch.setenv("BOOKSTACK_TOKEN_ID", "test_id")
    monkeypatch.setenv("BOOKSTACK_TOKEN_SECRET", "test_secret")
    return BookStackToolset()

@pytest.mark.asyncio
@patch("httpx.AsyncClient.get")
async def test_fetch_policies_global(mock_get, bookstack_tool):
    """Global (L1) м •мұ… мЎ°нҡҢ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
    mock_books = MagicMock()
    mock_books.json.return_value = {"data": [{"id": 43}]}
    mock_books.status_code = 200
    
    mock_book_detail = MagicMock()
    mock_book_detail.json.return_value = {
        "contents": [
            {
                "type": "chapter",
                "slug": "rules",
                "pages": [{"id": 1, "name": "Global Rule 1"}]
            },
            {
                "type": "chapter",
                "slug": "skills",
                "pages": [{"id": 2, "name": "Global Skill 1"}]
            }
        ]
    }
    mock_book_detail.status_code = 200
    
    mock_page_1 = MagicMock()
    mock_page_1.json.return_value = {"markdown": "Global Rules (L1)\n1. Never use root access."}
    mock_page_1.status_code = 200
    
    mock_page_2 = MagicMock()
    mock_page_2.json.return_value = {"markdown": "Global Skills (L1)\n1. Know Linux."}
    mock_page_2.status_code = 200
    
    mock_get.side_effect = [mock_books, mock_book_detail, mock_page_1, mock_page_2]

    response = await bookstack_tool.fetch_policies(scope_tag="global")
    assert "Global Rules (L1)" in response
    assert "Global Skills (L1)" in response

@pytest.mark.asyncio
@patch("httpx.AsyncClient.get")
async def test_fetch_policies_workspace_success(mock_get, bookstack_tool):
    """Workspace (L2) м •мғҒ мЎ°нҡҢ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
    project_id = "Project_Alpha"
    
    mock_books = MagicMock()
    mock_books.json.return_value = {"data": [{"id": 44}]}
    mock_books.status_code = 200
    
    mock_book_detail = MagicMock()
    mock_book_detail.json.return_value = {
        "contents": [
            {
                "type": "chapter",
                "slug": "rules",
                "pages": [{"id": 3, "name": "Workspace Rule 1"}]
            },
            {
                "type": "chapter",
                "slug": "skills",
                "pages": [{"id": 4, "name": "Workspace Skill 1"}]
            }
        ]
    }
    mock_book_detail.status_code = 200
    
    mock_page_3 = MagicMock()
    mock_page_3.json.return_value = {"markdown": f"Workspace {project_id} Rules\n1. Use PostgreSQL"}
    mock_page_3.status_code = 200
    
    mock_page_4 = MagicMock()
    mock_page_4.json.return_value = {"markdown": f"Workspace {project_id} Skills\n1. Python Async"}
    mock_page_4.status_code = 200
    
    mock_get.side_effect = [mock_books, mock_book_detail, mock_page_3, mock_page_4]

    response = await bookstack_tool.fetch_policies(scope_tag="workspace", project_id=project_id)
    assert f"Workspace {project_id} Rules" in response
    assert "PostgreSQL" in response
    assert "Python Async" in response

@pytest.mark.asyncio
async def test_fetch_policies_workspace_missing_id(bookstack_tool):
    """Workspace (L2) мЎ°нҡҢ мӢң project_idк°Җ лҲ„лқҪлҗҳм—Ҳмқ„ л•Ңмқҳ мҳҲмҷё мІҳлҰ¬ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
    response = await bookstack_tool.fetch_policies(scope_tag="workspace")
    assert "Error: Workspace scope requires a project_id." in response

@pytest.mark.asyncio
@patch("httpx.AsyncClient.get")
@patch("httpx.AsyncClient.put")
async def test_publish_sync_report(mock_put, mock_get, bookstack_tool):
    """Sync кІ°кіј(Release Notes) нҚјлё”лҰ¬мӢұ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
    project_id = "Project_Alpha"
    diff_md = "## Changes\n- Installed something"
    
    mock_search = MagicMock()
    mock_search.json.return_value = {"data": [{"id": 3}]}
    mock_search.status_code = 200
    mock_get.return_value = mock_search
    
    mock_put_res = MagicMock()
    mock_put_res.status_code = 200
    mock_put.return_value = mock_put_res

    response = await bookstack_tool.publish_sync_report(project_id=project_id, diff_md=diff_md)
    assert f"Successfully updated Release Notes for project {project_id}" in response


================================================================================
File: tests/test_bookstack_live.py
================================================================================
import pytest
import os
from dotenv import load_dotenv

load_dotenv()

from arti_ops.tools.bookstack import BookStackToolset

# мқҙ н…ҢмҠӨнҠёлҠ” мӢӨм ң .env м—җ м§Җм •лҗң BookStack м„ңлІ„лҘј мЎ°нҡҢн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
# pytest лӘ…л № мӢң лқјмқҙлёҢлҹ¬мҠӨнҠёлҘј кұҙл„Ҳлӣ°л Өл©ҙ pytest -m "not live" лЎң мҲҳн–үн•ҳкұ°лӮҳ
# .env нҶ нҒ°мқҙ м—Ҷмңјл©ҙ skip лҗҳлҸ„лЎқ кө¬м„ұн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
pytestmark = pytest.mark.skipif(
    not os.getenv("BOOKSTACK_TOKEN_ID"), 
    reason="BookStack нҶ нҒ°мқҙ м„Өм •лҗҳм§Җ м•Ҡм•„ Live н…ҢмҠӨнҠёлҘј кұҙл„ҲлңҒлӢҲлӢӨ."
)

@pytest.fixture
def live_bookstack_tool():
    """мӢӨм ң .env нҷҳкІҪ ліҖмҲҳлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” BookStackToolset мқёмҠӨн„ҙмҠӨ"""
    return BookStackToolset()

@pytest.mark.asyncio
async def test_live_fetch_global_policy(live_bookstack_tool):
    """мӢӨм ң нҶөмӢ мқ„ нҶөн•ң Global(L1) м •мұ… мЎ°нҡҢ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
    response = await live_bookstack_tool.fetch_policies(scope_tag="global")
    
    # мҳ¬л°”лҘҙкІҢ APIлҘј мЎ°нҡҢн–ҲлҠ”м§Җ, нҳ№мқҖ м—ҶлҠ” л¬ём„ңмқём§Җ мөңмҶҢн•ң л¬ёмһҗм—ҙлЎң л°ҳнҷҳлҗЁмқ„ нҷ•мқё
    print(f"\n[Global L1 лЈ° мқ‘лӢө]:\n{response}\n")
    assert isinstance(response, str)

@pytest.mark.asyncio
async def test_live_fetch_workspace_policy(live_bookstack_tool):
    """мӢӨм ң нҶөмӢ мқ„ нҶөн•ң Workspace(L2) м •мұ… мЎ°нҡҢ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
    # мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗк°Җ мӨҖл№„ мӨ‘мқё мһ„мқҳмқҳ н…ҢмҠӨнҠёмҡ© workspace id
    project_id = "arti-ops"
    response = await live_bookstack_tool.fetch_policies(scope_tag="workspace", project_id=project_id)
    
    print(f"\n[Workspace L2 лЈ° мқ‘лӢө ({project_id})]:\n{response}\n")
    assert isinstance(response, str)


================================================================================
File: tests/test_executor.py
================================================================================
import os
from google.adk import Agent
from arti_ops.agents.executor import get_executor_agent

def test_executor_agent_initialization():
    """
    Executor м—җмқҙм „нҠёк°Җ мҳ¬л°”лҘё нҢҢлқјлҜён„°лЎң мғқм„ұлҗҳлҠ”м§Җ нҷ•мқён•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
    """
    # м—җмқҙм „нҠё мғқм„ұ
    agent = get_executor_agent()
    
    # нғҖмһ… кІҖмҰқ
    assert isinstance(agent, Agent)
    
    # мҶҚм„ұ кІҖмҰқ
    assert agent.name == "deployment_executor"
    assert "л°°нҸ¬ м§‘н–үкҙҖ 'Executor'" in agent.instruction
    assert "write_file" in agent.instruction
    assert "send_summary" in agent.instruction
    assert agent.model == os.getenv("GEMINI_MODEL_FLASH", "gemini-2.5-flash")


================================================================================
File: tests/test_executor_live.py
================================================================================
import os
import pytest
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv()

from google.genai.types import Content, Part
from google.adk import Runner
from google.adk.sessions import InMemorySessionService
from arti_ops.agents.executor import get_executor_agent

@pytest.mark.asyncio
@pytest.mark.skipif("GEMINI_API_KEY" not in os.environ, reason="Env vars are not set")
async def test_live_executor_agent_execution():
    """
    мӢӨм ң Gemini APIлҘј м—®м–ҙ Executor м—җмқҙм „нҠёк°Җ
    м „лӢ¬л°ӣмқҖ к°ҖмғҒмқҳ мҠӨнҒ¬лҰҪнҠё мӢӨн–ү н”Ңлһңмқ„ кІҖнҶ н•ҳкі  мҲҳн–ү кІ°кіјлҘј лӮҙлҠ”м§Җ нҷ•мқён•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
    (нҳ„мһ¬ нҲҙмқҙ мЈјмһ…лҗҳм§Җ м•ҠмқҖ мҲңмҲҳ м—җмқҙм „нҠё м¶”лЎ  лҸҷмһ‘ кІҖмҰқ)
    """
    # 1. м—җмқҙм „нҠё мӨҖл№„
    executor_agent = get_executor_agent()

    # 2. ADK Runner кө¬м„ұ
    runner = Runner(
        app_name="arti-ops-executor",
        agent=executor_agent,
        session_service=InMemorySessionService(),
        auto_create_session=True
    )

    # 3. н…ҢмҠӨнҠёмҡ© н”„лЎ¬н”„нҠё
    prompt = """
лӢӨмқҢмқҖ кІҖмҰқмқ„ нҶөкіјн•ң нҢҢмқҙмҚ¬ мҠӨнҒ¬лҰҪнҠё лӮҙмҡ©мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

```python
import os
def main():
    print("Deploying artifacts...")
    os.makedirs("logs", exist_ok=True)
    with open("logs/deploy_log.txt", "w") as f:
        f.write("Deploy successful.")
main()
```

мң„ мҠӨнҒ¬лҰҪнҠёлҘј л°ӣмқҖ л°°нҸ¬ м§‘н–үкҙҖмңјлЎңм„ң, лЎңм»¬ нҢҢмқј м“°кё°(File I/O) м Ғмҡ© л°Ҹ BookStack лҸҷкё°нҷ” нҚјлё”лҰ¬мӢң мһ‘м—…мқ„ мҲҳн–үн•ҙм•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
лӢ№мӢ мқҳ лӢӨмқҢ н–үлҸҷ кі„нҡҚмқ„ мҡ”м•Ҫ м„ңмҲ н•ҙ мЈјм„ёмҡ”.
"""

    print(f"\n[Executor Request]: {prompt}")

    # 4. Agent кө¬лҸҷ л°Ҹ мҠӨнҠёлҰј мҲҳм§‘
    final_response = ""
    message_content = Content(role="user", parts=[Part.from_text(text=prompt)])

    async for event in runner.run_async(user_id="test_user", session_id="test_session", new_message=message_content):
        # Event нғҖмһ… мӨ‘ ContentлҘј нҸ¬н•Ён•ң к°қмІҙм—җм„ң л©”мӢңм§Җ мЎ°к°Ғмқ„ л№јмҳөлӢҲлӢӨ.
        if getattr(event, "content", None) and event.content.parts:
            text = "".join([part.text for part in event.content.parts if part.text])
            if text:
                final_response += text
                
    print("\n======= [Executor Agent Response] =======")
    print(final_response)
    print("=========================================\n")

    # л¬ём„ң кІҖмҰқ
    assert final_response != ""
    lower_response = final_response.lower()
    
    # м§ҖмӢңл¬ё(instruction)м—җ нҸ¬н•Ёлҗң н•өмӢ¬ нӮӨмӣҢл“ңк°Җ м–ёкёүлҗҳлҠ”м§Җ нҷ•мқё
    assert "sandbox" in lower_response or "мғҢл“ңл°•мҠӨ" in lower_response or "к°ҖмғҒ" in lower_response or "dry-run" in lower_response or "нҢҢмқј м“°кё°" in lower_response or "bookstack" in lower_response or "л¶ҒмҠӨнғқ" in lower_response
    assert "deploy_log.txt" in lower_response or "deploying artifacts" in lower_response or "лЎңм»¬" in lower_response


================================================================================
File: tests/test_gws_chat.py
================================================================================
import os
import pytest
from unittest.mock import patch, MagicMock, AsyncMock
from arti_ops.tools.gws_chat import GwsChatTool


@pytest.mark.asyncio
async def test_gws_chat_no_space_id():
    """
