    GWS_SPACE_IDк°Җ м—Ҷмқ„ л•Ң send_summary()к°Җ мҳҲмҷё м—Ҷмқҙ early return н•ҳлҠ”м§Җ нҷ•мқён•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
    """
    with patch("arti_ops.tools.gws_chat.get_config", return_value=""):
        tool = GwsChatTool()
        with patch("asyncio.create_subprocess_exec") as mock_exec:
            result = await tool.send_summary("TEST-PROJ", "л°°нҸ¬ мҡ”м•Ҫ лӮҙмҡ©")
            # GWS_SPACE_IDк°Җ м—ҶмңјлҜҖлЎң subprocessк°Җ нҳём¶ңлҗҳм§Җ м•Ҡм•„м•ј н•Ё
            mock_exec.assert_not_called()
            assert "Skipped" in result


@pytest.mark.asyncio
@patch("arti_ops.tools.gws_chat.asyncio.create_subprocess_exec")
async def test_gws_chat_subprocess_call(mock_create_subprocess_exec):
    """
    GWS CLI subprocessк°Җ мҳ¬л°”лҘё мқёмһҗлЎң нҳём¶ңлҗҳлҠ”м§Җ нҷ•мқён•ҳлҠ” лӘЁнӮ№ н…ҢмҠӨнҠёмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
    """
    # м„ңлёҢн”„лЎңм„ёмҠӨ Mock м„Өм • (м„ұкіө мқ‘лӢө мӢңл®¬л Ҳмқҙм…ҳ)
    mock_process = MagicMock()
    mock_process.communicate = AsyncMock(return_value=(b"success", b""))
    mock_process.returncode = 0
    mock_create_subprocess_exec.return_value = mock_process

    with patch("arti_ops.tools.gws_chat.get_config", return_value="spaces/TEST_SPACE"):
        tool = GwsChatTool()
        result = await tool.send_summary("TEST-PROJ-01", "```diff\n+ new_line\n```")

    # asyncio.create_subprocess_exec к°Җ мҳ¬л°”лҘё мқёмһҗл“ӨлЎң нҳём¶ңлҗҳм—ҲлҠ”м§Җ нҷ•мқё
    mock_create_subprocess_exec.assert_called_once()
    args, kwargs = mock_create_subprocess_exec.call_args

    assert args[0] == "gws"
    assert args[1] == "chat"
    assert args[2] == "+send"
    assert "--space" in args
    assert "spaces/TEST_SPACE" in args
    assert "--text" in args
    assert "TEST-PROJ-01" in result or "successfully" in result


================================================================================
File: tests/test_gws_chat_live.py
================================================================================
import os
import pytest
from dotenv import load_dotenv

# dotenv лӘ…мӢңм Ғ лЎңл”©
load_dotenv()

from arti_ops.tools.gws_chat import GwsChatTool

@pytest.mark.asyncio
@pytest.mark.skipif(
    not os.getenv("GWS_SPACE_ID"), 
    reason="GWS_SPACE_IDк°Җ м—ҶмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. мӢӨм ң л°ңмҶЎ н…ҢмҠӨнҠёлҠ” нҷҳкІҪліҖмҲҳк°Җ м„Өм •лҗҳм–ҙм•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ."
)
async def test_gws_chat_tool_live_send():
    """
    мӢӨм ңлЎң GWS мұ„л„җм—җ Webhook(CLI) л©”мӢңм§ҖлҘј л°ңмҶЎн•ҙліҙлҠ” нҶөн•©/лқјмқҙлёҢ н…ҢмҠӨнҠёмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
    мқҙ н…ҢмҠӨнҠёлҠ” лЎңм»¬ .env м—җ GWS_SPACE_IDк°Җ м§Җм •лҗҳм–ҙ мһҲмқ„ л•Ңл§Ң мҲҳн–үлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
    """
    tool = GwsChatTool()
    
    project_id = "arti-ops-live-test"
    diff_md = "```diff\n- old_rule_ignored\n+ new_global_rule_enforced\n```"
    conflict_reason = "L1 кёҖлЎңлІҢ лЈ°кіј мӣҢнҒ¬мҠӨнҺҳмқҙмҠӨ(L2) м„Өм • м¶©лҸҢ к°җм§Җ. (мқҙ л©”мӢңм§ҖлҠ” н…ҢмҠӨнҠё л°ңмҶЎмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ)"
    
    # мҳҲмҷё м—Ҷмқҙ н•ЁмҲҳк°Җ мӢӨн–үлҗҳкі , н”„лЎңм„ёмҠӨк°Җ м •мғҒ мў…лЈҢлҗҳлҠ”м§Җ м җкІҖ
    await tool.request_approval(project_id, diff_md, conflict_reason)
    
    # GwsChatToolмқҳ runмқҖ ADK Pipeline PauseлҘј мң„н•ҙ dictлҘј л°ҳнҷҳн•ҙм•јн•Ё.
    result = await tool.run(f"{project_id}-run-method", diff_md, conflict_reason)
    
    assert isinstance(result, dict)
    assert result.get("status") == "pending_approval"
    assert "arti-ops-live-test" in result.get("project_id", "")


================================================================================
File: tests/test_pipeline.py
================================================================================
import pytest
from arti_ops.core.pipeline import ArtiOpsPipeline

def test_pipeline_initialization():
    """
    ArtiOpsPipelineмқҙ м •мғҒм ҒмңјлЎң лҸ„кө¬ л°Ҹ м—җмқҙм „нҠёлҘј мҙҲкё°нҷ”н•ҳлҠ”м§Җ кІҖмҰқн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
    """
    target_project_id = "TEST-PROJ-123"
    pipeline = ArtiOpsPipeline(target_project_id)

    # мҶҚм„ұ мҙҲкё°нҷ” лЎңм§Ғ м җкІҖ
    assert pipeline.target_project_id == target_project_id

    # Tools м„ м–ё мІҙнҒ¬
    assert pipeline.bookstack_tool is not None
    assert pipeline.file_io_tool is not None
    assert pipeline.gws_chat_tool is not None

    # Agents м„ м–ё мІҙнҒ¬
    assert pipeline.profiler is not None
    assert pipeline.architect is not None
    assert pipeline.verifier is not None
    assert pipeline.executor is not None

    # Session service мЈјмһ… нҷ•мқё
    assert pipeline.session_service is not None


================================================================================
File: tests/test_pipeline_live.py
================================================================================
import os
import pytest
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv()

from arti_ops.core.pipeline import ArtiOpsPipeline

@pytest.mark.asyncio
@pytest.mark.skipif("GEMINI_API_KEY" not in os.environ, reason="Env vars are not set")
async def test_live_pipeline_execution():
    """
    мӢӨм ң Gemini APIмҷҖ м—°кІ°лҗң ArtiOpsPipelineмқҳ мҙҲкё° кө¬лҸҷ(Runner)мқҙ м •мғҒм Ғмқём§Җ нҷ•мқён•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
    """
    target_project_id = "TEST-LIVE-123"
    pipeline = ArtiOpsPipeline(target_project_id)
    
    # нҢҢмқҙн”„лқјмқё мӢӨн–ү: л¬ҙкұ°мҡҙ мһ‘м—…мқҙлӮҳ нҲҙ нҳём¶ңмқ„ л§үкё° мң„н•ҙ к°ҖлІјмҡҙ мқёмӮ¬л§Ң ліҙлғ„
    prompt = "м•Ҳл…•! мқҙкұҙ лқјмқҙлёҢ нҶөн•© н…ҢмҠӨнҠём•ј. м¶”к°Җ мһ‘м—…мқҙлӮҳ нҢҢмқј нғҗмғү м—Ҷмқҙ к·ёлғҘ м •мғҒ мў…лЈҢ(лӢөліҖ)н•ҙмӨҳ."
    
    events = []
    # нҢҢмқҙн”„лқјмқё Generator лЈЁн”„ нҷ•мқё
    async for event in pipeline.run(command_prompt=prompt, session_id="test-session-pipeline-live"):
        events.append(event)
        
    assert len(events) > 0
    
    # л§Ҳм§Җл§ү мқ‘лӢө кІҖмҰқ (м—җмқҙм „нҠёлЎңл¶Җн„° м–ҙл–Ө нҳ•нғңлЎңл“  лӢөліҖмқ„ л°ӣм•„м•ј н•Ё)
    final_output = ""
    for event in events:
        if getattr(event, "content", None) and event.content.parts:
            text = "".join([part.text for part in event.content.parts if part.text])
            if text:
                final_output += text
                
    assert final_output != ""
    print(f"\\n[Pipeline Response]: {final_output}")


================================================================================
File: tests/test_profiler.py
================================================================================
import os
import pytest
from unittest.mock import patch
from arti_ops.agents.profiler import get_profiler_agent
from google.adk import Agent


def test_profiler_agent_initialization():
    """Profiler Agent к°қмІҙк°Җ мҳ¬л°”лҘё мҙҲкё°к°’кіј м§ҖмӢңм–ҙ(Instructions)лҘј к°–кі  мғқм„ұлҗҳлҠ”м§Җ кІҖмҰқн•©лӢҲлӢӨ."""
    agent = get_profiler_agent()

    # нғҖмһ… кІҖмҰқ
    assert isinstance(agent, Agent)

    # мӢқлі„мһҗ л°Ҹ мқҙлҰ„ кІҖмҰқ
    assert getattr(agent, "name", "") == "context_profiler"

    # н•өмӢ¬ мӢңмҠӨн…ң н”„лЎ¬н”„нҠё(Instructions) лӮҙмҡ© кІҖмҰқ (нҳ„мһ¬ profiler.py кё°мӨҖ)
    inst = getattr(agent, "instruction", "")
    assert "Context Profiler" in inst
    assert ".agents/" in inst


================================================================================
File: tests/test_profiler_live.py
================================================================================
import pytest
import os
from dotenv import load_dotenv

load_dotenv()

from google.adk import Runner
from google.adk.sessions import InMemorySessionService
from google.genai.types import Content, Part
from arti_ops.agents.profiler import get_profiler_agent
from arti_ops.tools.bookstack import BookStackToolset

@pytest.mark.asyncio
@pytest.mark.skipif("BOOKSTACK_API_URL" not in os.environ or "GEMINI_API_KEY" not in os.environ, reason="Env vars are not set")
async def test_live_profiler_agent_execution():
    """
    мӢӨм ң BookStackToolset кіј Gemini APIлҘј м—®м–ҙ Profiler м—җмқҙм „нҠёк°Җ 
    Context мҠӨмәҗлӢқ нӣ„ мҡ”м•Ҫ лҰ¬нҸ¬нҠёлҘј мһҳ л§Ңл“Өм–ҙлӮҙлҠ”м§Җ нҷ•мқён•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
    """
    # 1. нҲҙ л°Ҹ м—җмқҙм „нҠё мӨҖл№„
    bookstack_tool = BookStackToolset()
    profiler_agent = get_profiler_agent(tools=[bookstack_tool])
    
    # 2. ADK Runner кө¬м„ұ
    runner = Runner(
        app_name="arti-ops-profiler",
        agent=profiler_agent,
        session_service=InMemorySessionService(),
        auto_create_session=True
    )
    
    # 3. н…ҢмҠӨнҠёмҡ© н”„лЎ¬н”„нҠё л°Ҹ м»Ён…ҚмҠӨнҠё
    prompt = "нҳ„мһ¬ arti-ops н”„лЎңм қнҠёмқҳ Workspace лЈ°(L2)кіј Global лЈ°(L1)мқ„ мҲҳм§‘н•ҳкі  лҰ¬нҸ¬нҠёлҘј л§Ңл“Өм–ҙмЈјм„ёмҡ”."
    
    print(f"\n[Profiler Request]: {prompt}")
    
    # 4. Agent кө¬лҸҷ л°Ҹ мҠӨнҠёлҰј мҲҳм§‘
    final_response = ""
    message_content = Content(role="user", parts=[Part.from_text(text=prompt)])
    
    async for event in runner.run_async(user_id="test_user", session_id="test_session", new_message=message_content):
        # Event нғҖмһ… мӨ‘ ContentлҘј нҸ¬н•Ён•ң к°қмІҙм—җм„ң л©”мӢңм§Җ мЎ°к°Ғмқ„ л№јмҳөлӢҲлӢӨ.
        if getattr(event, "content", None) and event.content.parts:
            text = "".join([part.text for part in event.content.parts if part.text])
            if text:
                final_response += text
    print("=========================================\n")
    
    # л¬ём„ң кІҖмҰқ
    assert final_response != ""
    assert len(final_response) > 50


================================================================================
File: tests/test_verifier.py
================================================================================
import os
from google.adk import Agent
from arti_ops.agents.verifier import get_verifier_agent

def test_verifier_agent_initialization():
    """
    Verifier м—җмқҙм „нҠёк°Җ мҳ¬л°”лҘё нҢҢлқјлҜён„°лЎң мғқм„ұлҗҳлҠ”м§Җ нҷ•мқён•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
    """
    # м—җмқҙм „нҠё мғқм„ұ
    agent = get_verifier_agent()
    
    # нғҖмһ… кІҖмҰқ
    assert isinstance(agent, Agent)
    
    # мҶҚм„ұ кІҖмҰқ
    assert agent.name == "critical_verifier"
    assert "м•„нӮӨн…ҚнҠёк°Җ мһ‘м„ұн•ң кё°нҡҚм•Ҳ" in agent.instruction
    assert ".agents/rules/" in agent.instruction
    assert agent.model == os.getenv("GEMINI_MODEL_PRO", "gemini-2.5-pro")


================================================================================
File: tests/test_verifier_live.py
================================================================================
import os
import pytest
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv()

from google.genai.types import Content, Part
from google.adk import Runner
from google.adk.sessions import InMemorySessionService
from arti_ops.agents.verifier import get_verifier_agent

@pytest.mark.asyncio
@pytest.mark.skipif("GEMINI_API_KEY" not in os.environ, reason="Env vars are not set")
async def test_live_verifier_agent_execution():
    """
    мӢӨм ң Gemini APIлҘј м—®м–ҙ Verifier м—җмқҙм „нҠёк°Җ
    к°ҖмғҒмқҳ мң„л°ҳ мҠӨнҒ¬лҰҪнҠёлҘј ліҙкі , л¬ём ңм җмқ„ м •нҷ•нһҲ м§Җм Ғн•ҙ лӮҙлҠ”м§Җ нҷ•мқён•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
    """
    # 1. м—җмқҙм „нҠё мӨҖл№„
    verifier_agent = get_verifier_agent()

    # 2. ADK Runner кө¬м„ұ
    runner = Runner(
        app_name="arti-ops-verifier",
        agent=verifier_agent,
        session_service=InMemorySessionService(),
        auto_create_session=True
    )

    # 3. н…ҢмҠӨнҠёмҡ© н”„лЎ¬н”„нҠё л°Ҹ м»Ён…ҚмҠӨнҠё (мқҳлҸ„м ҒмңјлЎң Rule мң„л°ҳ мғҒнҷ© м—°м¶ң)
    prompt = """
лӢӨмқҢмқҖ мқҙм „ лӢЁкі„(Architect)м—җм„ң мһ‘м„ұлҗң л°°нҸ¬мҡ© нҢҢмқҙмҚ¬ мҠӨнҒ¬лҰҪнҠёмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

[L1 Global Rules]
- лӘЁл“  ліҖмҲҳлӘ…мқҖ snake_caseлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©.
- мҷёл¶Җ API нҳём¶ңмқҖ м—„кІ©нһҲ кёҲм§Җ.

[мһ‘м„ұлҗң мҪ”л“ң лӮҙмҡ©]
```python
def fetchExternalData():
    import urllib.request
    resultData = urllib.request.urlopen("http://example.com").read()
    return resultData
```

мҪ”л“ң лҰ¬л·° л¶ҖнғҒн•©лӢҲлӢӨ. мң„ к·ңм№ҷл“Өм—җ м–ҙкёӢлӮҳлҠ” л¶Җл¶„мқҙ мһҲлӢӨл©ҙ кө¬мІҙм ҒмңјлЎң м§Җм Ғн•ҙ мЈјм„ёмҡ”.
"""

    print(f"\n[Verifier Request]: {prompt}")

    # 4. Agent кө¬лҸҷ л°Ҹ мҠӨнҠёлҰј мҲҳм§‘
    final_response = ""
    message_content = Content(role="user", parts=[Part.from_text(text=prompt)])

    async for event in runner.run_async(user_id="test_user", session_id="test_session", new_message=message_content):
        # Event нғҖмһ… мӨ‘ ContentлҘј нҸ¬н•Ён•ң к°қмІҙм—җм„ң л©”мӢңм§Җ мЎ°к°Ғмқ„ л№јмҳөлӢҲлӢӨ.
        if getattr(event, "content", None) and event.content.parts:
            text = "".join([part.text for part in event.content.parts if part.text])
            if text:
                final_response += text
                
    print("\n======= [Verifier Agent Response] =======")
    print(final_response)
    print("=========================================\n")

    # л¬ём„ң кІҖмҰқ
    assert final_response != ""
    lower_response = final_response.lower()
    
    # лұҖн‘ңкё°лІ•(snake_case) мң„л°ҳ м§Җм Ғ м—¬л¶Җ кІҖмҰқ
    assert "snake_case" in lower_response or "camelcase" in lower_response
    # мҷёл¶Җ API нҳём¶ң мң„л°ҳ м§Җм Ғ м—¬л¶Җ кІҖмҰқ
    assert "мҷёл¶Җ api" in lower_response or "api нҳём¶ң" in lower_response or "urllib" in lower_response
